jobs.title: Team Assistant Concierge and Guest Services  (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Team Assistant Concierge and Guest Services  (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
Handling Guest Inquiries: You respond to written and telephone inquiries in a professional and service-oriented manner, working in close coordination with the Concierge Team.
 Administrative Support: You assist the Concierge Team in daily operations by reliably managing administrative tasks and scheduling.
 Data Management & Documentation: You maintain guest information and internal overviews, ensuring accurate and well-organized documentation of relevant data.
 Process Optimization: You identify opportunities to streamline workflows and implement minor automation solutions using tools such as Power Automate or Zapier.
 Backoffice Coordination: You keep track of tasks, deadlines, and internal communication, ensuring a smooth flow of information within the team.
 Quality Assurance: You help monitor the tools and systems in use and contribute ideas for improving the overall guest service offering.

## This is you
A structured, self-reliant work style with a strong sense of quality, discretion, and reliability.
 Excellent verbal and written communication skills in German and English – any additional language, especially Italian, is a plus.
 A passion for organization, strong digital skills, and confident use of MS Office applications.
 A service-driven mindset: you see yourself as a supportive team member working behind the scenes – and you know that outstanding guest experiences are built on an excellent back office.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Assistant Reservations Manager  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usYou are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration.
This is youProfessional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience.   Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales.   Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus.   Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm.   Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usFront Office & Guest: Handling late check-ins and early check-outs, providing professional guest assistance via telephone, and fulfilling special guest requests.Valet & Luggage Service: Parking guest vehicles in the garage as well as assisting with luggage service and rooming.Night Audit: Completing the daily closing in the system (Opera Cloud), auditing outlet reports, and managing physical cash handling for the accounting department.Security & Control: Conducting regular security rounds, monitoring the fire alarm panel, and ensuring night-time peace and quiet throughout the premises.Preparation: Generating department reports, purchasing and posting newspapers, and providing shoe shine services for our guests.
This is youExperience: A solid background in the hotel industry (preferably in the 5-star segment) and ideally previous experience in night shifts.IT Proficiency: Confident handling of PMS systems (Opera Cloud) as well as standard MS Office applications.Languages: Fluent in German and English; knowledge of Italian is a significant advantage due to our location and clientele.Commitment: A valid driver’s license and the physical fitness required for security rounds and luggage handling.Personality: A high sense of responsibility, absolute discretion, and a polished appearance that meets our luxury standards.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Driver  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usWarm welcome for our guests: With your natural friendliness and charisma, you make every guest feel at home from the very first moment.Valet parking: You park our guests' vehicles in the underground garage and manage garage logistics, always with attention to detail and order.Guest transfers: Whether it’s from the ski lift or to the restaurant, you handle guest transfers with the hotel shuttle, ensuring a safe and pleasant ride.Guest services: loading/ unloading the guests luggage and handling small errands as needed.
This is youNatural Friendliness and Charisma: You can almost anticipate the needs of our discerning guests and make every effort to ensure their stay is as pleasant as possible.Groomed Appearance and Excellent Manners: You represent our hotel with style, impressing with professional politeness and an elegant demeanor.Team Spirit and Flexibility: You enjoy working in a dynamic team, quickly adapting to various demands, always with a smile.Valid Driver's License: Of course, you have a valid driver's license and feel comfortable maneuvering in tight parking spaces and on the road.Language Skills: Ideally, you speak German and English, with additional languages (particularly Italian) being a welcome advantage.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

 Backoffice Coordination: You keep track of tasks, deadlines, and internal communication, ensuring a smooth flow of information within the team.
 Quality Assurance: You help monitor the tools and systems in use and contribute ideas for improving the overall guest service offering.

## This is you
A structured, self-reliant work style with a strong sense of quality, discretion, and reliability.
 Excellent verbal and written communication skills in German and English – any additional language, especially Italian, is a plus.
 A passion for organization, strong digital skills, and confident use of MS Office applications.
 A service-driven mindset: you see yourself as a supportive team member working behind the scenes – and you know that outstanding guest experiences are built on an excellent back office.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%

Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration.

Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development.

jobs.description:
Assistant Event Manager (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2025-12-01.

## This is what you move with us
Are you an organizational talent with a passion for high-end events? Do you thrive in challenging situations, maintaining an overview while ensuring seamless event execution? If so, you are exactly who we are looking for.As Assistant Event Manager, you will be the right hand of our Event Manager, shaping exclusive events – from elegant gala dinners to high-profile international business meetings.Your Responsibilities:Event Coordination & Execution: Oversee the entire planning process, create proposals, coordinate workflows, and ensure flawless on-site implementation.
Guest Relations & Service Excellence: Serve as the primary point of contact for clients and partners, managing every detail from initial inquiries to post-event follow-ups.
Administrative Expertise: Prepare offers, confirmations, and invoices while handling event bookings and ensuring accurate execution.
Seamless Internal Coordination: Ensure effective communication across departments to guarantee all relevant information is shared in a timely manner.
Quality Management & Innovation: Continuously refine event operations, contribute creative ideas, and stay updated on industry trends.

## This is you
Proven Experience at the Highest Level: Several years of experience in event coordination within the 5-star hospitality industry or luxury gastronomy.
Excellent Language Skills: Native or fluent German, very good English, additional languages are a plus.
Organizational Talent with an Eye for Detail: A structured approach, strong multitasking skills, and a hands-on mentality.
Passion for Hospitality: A professional demeanor, outstanding communication skills, and a keen understanding of luxury clientele.
Digital Savvy: Proficient in event management systems, MS Office, and internal hotel software.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Breakfast Cook/ Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usIt is not just about cooking; it is about orchestrating the most important moment of the day in an environment of the highest standard.Creativity at the Buffet: You are responsible for the preparation and presentation of our magnificent daily buffet. From precisely sliced fresh fruits to the finest small pastries – every detail matters.Master of Egg Dishes: Whether it is fluffy omelets or perfect Eggs Benedict – you prepare à la carte orders with mastery and speed.Quality and Care: You oversee the storage of raw materials and guarantee absolute freshness. Order and hygiene (HACCP) are your calling card.Team Spirit: When needed, you actively support the Chefs de Partie and work together to maintain our excellent standards.start June, end ca. 06.04.2027
This is youThe early bird catches the worm. While others are still slumbering, you are performing at your best. We are looking for a sunny personality who loves the early morning and accompanies our guests into the day with energy and a smile:Education: You are a certified chef or have at least 2 years of specific professional experience in this field.Skills: You have mastered various cooking methods and breakfast pastry arts.Mindset: You implement the hotel's standard recipes with confidence and have an eye for continuous improvement.Reliability: Punctuality, as well as maintaining personal hygiene and a clean workspace, are second nature to you.Languages: Italian as well as English or German.Why Kronenhof:Working with us means becoming part of a legend in Swiss hospitality – in an environment where talent is truly valued.We offer stable employment in one of the most exclusive locations in the world.Life in the Engadin: We support you with the logistics! We provide staff housing at fair, fixed prices, so you can enjoy the nature and activities in Pontresina stress-free.Growth: Continuous training and development opportunities.Would you like to bring your passion into our kitchen and make breakfast at the Grand Hotel Kronenhof shine? We look forward to receiving your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Maître de Rang (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            Elevate your career to new heights at 1800 meters above sea level and become part of the Kulm Group family.  Are you ready to redefine the luxury mountain travel experience? Join our dynamic and international team at Kulm Group, where together we provide our guests with a unique luxury experience and create unforgettable memories.  Why Kulm Group?Pursuit of Excellence: Excellence is at the heart of everything we do. We strive daily to achieve the best and delight our guests and employees.Passionate Team: Work in a vibrant, international team that supports and inspires each other. Experience true camaraderie and team spirit with us.Career Opportunities: Unlock your potential and grow with us. We are committed to your personal and professional development.Unique Culture: Immerse yourself in a work environment that values creativity, passion, and authenticity. Here, you can bring your ideas to life and make a real impact.  Be part of something extraordinary!
This is what you move with usYou confidently manage your section, ensuring seamless service with a smile and attention to detail.You coordinate your team, delegate tasks, and guarantee flawless execution.You are a true host at heart, advising our international guests on menu and wine pairings.You take on administrative tasks such as shift planning and order management with efficiency and structure.You introduce fresh ideas and create innovative guest experiences that leave a lasting impression.You share your expertise with your team, continuously fostering training and development.
This is youA completed education in fine dining and experience in luxury hospitality or high-end gastronomy.Leadership experience and the ability to motivate and inspire your team to excellence.Outstanding communication skills and enthusiasm for working with an international clientele.Strong organizational skills, a high sense of quality, and a drive to set new standards.Flexibility, resilience, and a passion for delivering exceptional service.Fluency in German and English is essential; additional languages are a plus.Set new standards in fine dining and become part of our team. We look forward to your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## This is what you move with us
Are you an organizational talent with a passion for high-end events? Do you thrive in challenging situations, maintaining an overview while ensuring seamless event execution? Administrative Expertise: Prepare offers, confirmations, and invoices while handling event bookings and ensuring accurate execution.

Passion for Hospitality: A professional demeanor, outstanding communication skills, and a keen understanding of luxury clientele.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%

jobs.title: Assistant Reservations Manager  (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Assistant Reservations Manager  (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-08-01.

## This is what you move with us
You are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.
You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.
You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.
You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.
You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.
You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.
Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration.

## This is you
Professional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience. 
  Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales. 
  Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus. 
  Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm. 
  Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usFront Office & Guest: Handling late check-ins and early check-outs, providing professional guest assistance via telephone, and fulfilling special guest requests.Valet & Luggage Service: Parking guest vehicles in the garage as well as assisting with luggage service and rooming.Night Audit: Completing the daily closing in the system (Opera Cloud), auditing outlet reports, and managing physical cash handling for the accounting department.Security & Control: Conducting regular security rounds, monitoring the fire alarm panel, and ensuring night-time peace and quiet throughout the premises.Preparation: Generating department reports, purchasing and posting newspapers, and providing shoe shine services for our guests.
This is youExperience: A solid background in the hotel industry (preferably in the 5-star segment) and ideally previous experience in night shifts.IT Proficiency: Confident handling of PMS systems (Opera Cloud) as well as standard MS Office applications.Languages: Fluent in German and English; knowledge of Italian is a significant advantage due to our location and clientele.Commitment: A valid driver’s license and the physical fitness required for security rounds and luggage handling.Personality: A high sense of responsibility, absolute discretion, and a polished appearance that meets our luxury standards.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Driver  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usWarm welcome for our guests: With your natural friendliness and charisma, you make every guest feel at home from the very first moment.Valet parking: You park our guests' vehicles in the underground garage and manage garage logistics, always with attention to detail and order.Guest transfers: Whether it’s from the ski lift or to the restaurant, you handle guest transfers with the hotel shuttle, ensuring a safe and pleasant ride.Guest services: loading/ unloading the guests luggage and handling small errands as needed.
This is youNatural Friendliness and Charisma: You can almost anticipate the needs of our discerning guests and make every effort to ensure their stay is as pleasant as possible.Groomed Appearance and Excellent Manners: You represent our hotel with style, impressing with professional politeness and an elegant demeanor.Team Spirit and Flexibility: You enjoy working in a dynamic team, quickly adapting to various demands, always with a smile.Valid Driver's License: Of course, you have a valid driver's license and feel comfortable maneuvering in tight parking spaces and on the road.Language Skills: Ideally, you speak German and English, with additional languages (particularly Italian) being a welcome advantage.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Team Assistant Concierge and Guest Services  (m/w/d)
Kulm Hotel
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usHandling Guest Inquiries: You respond to written and telephone inquiries in a professional and service-oriented manner, working in close coordination with the Concierge Team. Administrative Support: You assist the Concierge Team in daily operations by reliably managing administrative tasks and scheduling. Data Management & Documentation: You maintain guest information and internal overviews, ensuring accurate and well-organized documentation of relevant data. Process Optimization: You identify opportunities to streamline workflows and implement minor automation solutions using tools such as Power Automate or Zapier. Backoffice Coordination: You keep track of tasks, deadlines, and internal communication, ensuring a smooth flow of information within the team. Quality Assurance: You help monitor the tools and systems in use and contribute ideas for improving the overall guest service offering.
This is youA structured, self-reliant work style with a strong sense of quality, discretion, and reliability. Excellent verbal and written communication skills in German and English – any additional language, especially Italian, is a plus. A passion for organization, strong digital skills, and confident use of MS Office applications. A service-driven mindset: you see yourself as a supportive team member working behind the scenes – and you know that outstanding guest experiences are built on an excellent back office.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

Sécurité & Contrôle & #160;: Effectuer régulièrement des rondes de sécurité, surveiller le panneau d'alarme incendie et assurer la paix et la tranquillité nocturnes dans l'ensemble des locaux. Préparation: Générer des rapports département, acheter et poster des journaux, et fournir des services de cire de chaussures pour nos invités. C'est vousExpérience: Une solide expérience dans l'industrie hôtelière (de préférence dans le segment 5 étoiles) et idéalement une expérience antérieure dans les équipes de nuit. Les Compétence : Gestion fiable des systèmes PMS (Opera Cloud) ainsi que des applications MS Office standard. Langues : Connaissance de l'allemand et de l'anglais ; la connaissance de l'italien est un avantage important en raison de notre emplacement et de notre clientèle. Engagement : Un permis de conduire valide et l'aptitude physique requise pour les rondes de sécurité et la manutention des bagages. Personnalité : Un haut sens des responsabilités, une discrétion absolue et une apparence polie qui répond à nos standards de luxe. Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages. ## Conducteur (m/w/d) Grand Hôtel Kronenhof 100% Les personnes à 1800m d'altitude façonnent le Luxury Mountain Travel. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos clients un luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous embrassons notre culture : luxe sous-estimé, inspiration et expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance d'être membre de notre culture de mode : C'est ce que vous déménagez avec nous Accueil chaleureux pour nos invités: Avec votre convivialité naturelle et votre charisme, chaque invité se sent chez lui dès le premier moment. Service de voiturier: Vous garez les véhicules de nos clients dans le garage souterrain et gérez la logistique du garage, toujours avec attention au détail et à la commande. Transferts aux clients : Qu'il s'agisse de l'ascenseur de ski ou du restaurant, vous gérez les transferts des clients avec la navette de l'hôtel, assurant un trajet sûr et agréable. Services aux clients: chargement/déchargement des bagages des clients et manutention de petites courses au besoin. C'est vous Amabilité naturelle et Charisme: Vous pouvez presque anticiper les besoins de nos clients éclairés et faire tout votre possible pour que leur séjour soit le plus agréable possible. Comparance groomed et Excellent Manners : Vous représentez notre hôtel avec style, impressionnant avec politesse professionnelle et un comportement élégant. Esprit d'équipe et flexibilité : Vous aimez travailler dans une équipe dynamique, s'adapter rapidement à diverses exigences, toujours avec un sourire. Permis de conduire valide : Bien sûr, vous avez un permis de conduire valide et vous sentez à l'aise manoeuvrer dans des espaces de stationnement serrés et sur la route. Compétences linguistiques : Idéalement, vous parlez allemand et anglais, avec d'autres langues (en particulier l'italien) étant un avantage de bienvenue. Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages. ## Team Assistant Concierge and Guest Services (m/w/d) Kulm Hotel 100% Les personnes à 1800m au-dessus du niveau de la mer façonnent le voyage de montagne de luxe. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos clients un luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous acceptons notre culture : luxe sous-estimé, inspiration et expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance d'être membre de notre culture de mode : Voici ce que vous déménagez avec nous. Vous répondez aux demandes écrites et téléphoniques de manière professionnelle et axée sur le service, en étroite coordination avec l'équipe de conciergerie. Appui administratif : Vous aidez l'équipe de conciergerie dans les opérations quotidiennes en gérant de manière fiable les tâches administratives et l'horaire. Gestion des données et documentation : Vous maintenez l'information des invités et des aperçus internes, assurant une documentation précise et bien organisée des données pertinentes. Optimisation du processus : Vous identifiez les possibilités de rationaliser les flux de travail et de mettre en œuvre des solutions d'automatisation mineures à l'aide d'outils tels que Power Automate ou Zapier. Coordination des services administratifs : Vous surveillez les tâches, les délais et la communication interne, assurant ainsi un flux d'information en douceur au sein de l'équipe. Assurance qualité : Vous aidez à surveiller les outils et les systèmes utilisés et à apporter des idées pour améliorer l'offre globale de services aux clients. C'est vousUn style de travail structuré et autonome avec un fort sens de la qualité, de la discrétion et de la fiabilité. Excellentes compétences en communication orale et écrite en allemand et en anglais – toute langue supplémentaire, en particulier l'italien, est un plus. Une passion pour l'organisation, de solides compétences numériques et l'utilisation confiante des applications MS Office. Un état d'esprit axé sur le service : vous vous voyez comme un membre de l'équipe de soutien travaillant dans les coulisses – et vous savez que les expériences exceptionnelles des invités sont construites sur un excellent back office. Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. jobs.title: Breakfast Cook/ Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Breakfast Cook/ Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-05.

## This is what you move with us
It is not just about cooking; it is about orchestrating the most important moment of the day in an environment of the highest standard.Creativity at the Buffet: You are responsible for the preparation and presentation of our magnificent daily buffet. From precisely sliced fresh fruits to the finest small pastries – every detail matters.
Master of Egg Dishes: Whether it is fluffy omelets or perfect Eggs Benedict – you prepare à la carte orders with mastery and speed.
Quality and Care: You oversee the storage of raw materials and guarantee absolute freshness. Order and hygiene (HACCP) are your calling card.
Team Spirit: When needed, you actively support the Chefs de Partie and work together to maintain our excellent standards.
start June, end ca. 06.04.2027

## This is you
The early bird catches the worm. While others are still slumbering, you are performing at your best. We are looking for a sunny personality who loves the early morning and accompanies our guests into the day with energy and a smile:Education: You are a certified chef or have at least 2 years of specific professional experience in this field.
Skills: You have mastered various cooking methods and breakfast pastry arts.
Mindset: You implement the hotel's standard recipes with confidence and have an eye for continuous improvement.
Reliability: Punctuality, as well as maintaining personal hygiene and a clean workspace, are second nature to you.
Languages: Italian as well as English or German.
Why Kronenhof:Working with us means becoming part of a legend in Swiss hospitality – in an environment where talent is truly valued.We offer stable employment in one of the most exclusive locations in the world.
Life in the Engadin: We support you with the logistics! We provide staff housing at fair, fixed prices, so you can enjoy the nature and activities in Pontresina stress-free.
Growth: Continuous training and development opportunities.
Would you like to bring your passion into our kitchen and make breakfast at the Grand Hotel Kronenhof shine? We look forward to receiving your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Maître de Rang (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            Elevate your career to new heights at 1800 meters above sea level and become part of the Kulm Group family.  Are you ready to redefine the luxury mountain travel experience? Join our dynamic and international team at Kulm Group, where together we provide our guests with a unique luxury experience and create unforgettable memories.  Why Kulm Group?Pursuit of Excellence: Excellence is at the heart of everything we do. We strive daily to achieve the best and delight our guests and employees.Passionate Team: Work in a vibrant, international team that supports and inspires each other. Experience true camaraderie and team spirit with us.Career Opportunities: Unlock your potential and grow with us. We are committed to your personal and professional development.Unique Culture: Immerse yourself in a work environment that values creativity, passion, and authenticity. Here, you can bring your ideas to life and make a real impact.  Be part of something extraordinary!
This is what you move with usYou confidently manage your section, ensuring seamless service with a smile and attention to detail.You coordinate your team, delegate tasks, and guarantee flawless execution.You are a true host at heart, advising our international guests on menu and wine pairings.You take on administrative tasks such as shift planning and order management with efficiency and structure.You introduce fresh ideas and create innovative guest experiences that leave a lasting impression.You share your expertise with your team, continuously fostering training and development.
This is youA completed education in fine dining and experience in luxury hospitality or high-end gastronomy.Leadership experience and the ability to motivate and inspire your team to excellence.Outstanding communication skills and enthusiasm for working with an international clientele.Strong organizational skills, a high sense of quality, and a drive to set new standards.Flexibility, resilience, and a passion for delivering exceptional service.Fluency in German and English is essential; additional languages are a plus.Set new standards in fine dining and become part of our team. We look forward to your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Commis de Rang/ Assistant Waiter  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usExclusive Guest Service: You will be the face of our service area, delighting our discerning guests with exceptional service. From the moment they arrive to their departure, you will be the point of contact for all their needs.Mise-en-place Preparation: Perfect preparation is key. You will ensure that your station is immaculate and that everything is in place before the guests arrive.Seamless Service Support: You will work hand-in-hand with your Chef de Rang to ensure a fluid and elegant service flow. This includes the professional serving and clearing of courses, as well as maintaining a watchful eye on the "silent" needs of our guests, such as water and bread service.
This is youExperience in Luxury Hospitality: You bring experience from renowned hotels and understand the high standards expected in a 5-star establishment.Language Skills: You are fluent in German and/or English, ideally you speak Italian as well. Any additional languages you speak are a plus, helping you better serve our international clientele.Excellent Manners: With your well-groomed appearance and outstanding manners, you leave a lasting impression on our guests.Passion for Perfection: You have an eye for detail and strive for perfection in everything you do. Your enthusiasm for the job is reflected in the quality of your work.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.de:
Breakfast Cook/ Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-05.

## This is what you move with us
It is not just about cooking; it is about orchestrating the most important moment of the day in an environment of the highest standard.Creativity at the Buffet: You are responsible for the preparation and presentation of our magnificent daily buffet. From precisely sliced fresh fruits to the finest small pastries – every detail matters.
Master of Egg Dishes: Whether it is fluffy omelets or perfect Eggs Benedict – you prepare à la carte orders with mastery and speed.
Quality and Care: You oversee the storage of raw materials and guarantee absolute freshness. Order and hygiene (HACCP) are your calling card.
Team Spirit: When needed, you actively support the Chefs de Partie and work together to maintain our excellent standards.
start June, end ca. 06.04.2027

## This is you
The early bird catches the worm. While others are still slumbering, you are performing at your best. We are looking for a sunny personality who loves the early morning and accompanies our guests into the day with energy and a smile:Education: You are a certified chef or have at least 2 years of specific professional experience in this field.
Skills: You have mastered various cooking methods and breakfast pastry arts.
Mindset: You implement the hotel's standard recipes with confidence and have an eye for continuous improvement.
Reliability: Punctuality, as well as maintaining personal hygiene and a clean workspace, are second nature to you.
Languages: Italian as well as English or German.
Why Kronenhof:Working with us means becoming part of a legend in Swiss hospitality – in an environment where talent is truly valued.We offer stable employment in one of the most exclusive locations in the world.
Life in the Engadin: We support you with the logistics! We provide staff housing at fair, fixed prices, so you can enjoy the nature and activities in Pontresina stress-free.
Growth: Continuous training and development opportunities.
Would you like to bring your passion into our kitchen and make breakfast at the Grand Hotel Kronenhof shine? We look forward to receiving your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01. ## C'est ce que vous faites avec nous Planification de menus créatifs et variés – Vous concevez quotidiennement des repas frais, sains et délicieux pour nos employés. Qualité et efficacité les plus élevées – Vous veillez à ce que tous les plats soient préparés avec des ingrédients de première qualité tout en optimisant les processus pour un fonctionnement fluide. Leadership et motivation – Vous dirigez votre petite équipe avec passion et professionnalisme, créant ainsi un environnement de travail positif et structuré. Rentabilité et durabilité – Vous planifiez efficacement les menus, minimisez le gaspillage alimentaire et mettez en œuvre des pratiques durables. Hygiène & organisation – Vous garantissez le respect des normes d’hygiène et de sécurité (HACCP) les plus élevées dans votre cuisine. ## C'est vous Expérience dans des hôtels 5 étoiles – Vous comprenez les normes d'excellente cuisine et de qualité. Passion pour la bonne chère – Vous aimez transformer des ingrédients frais en plats créatifs et équilibrés. Compétences en leadership et esprit d’équipe – Vous assumez des responsabilités, motivez votre équipe et favorisez une culture de travail respectueuse. Talent organisationnel et efficacité – Vous restez au courant même dans les moments chargés et travaillez de manière structurée. Créativité et durabilité – Vous développez de nouvelles idées pour des menus diversifiés tout en maintenant une approche responsable des ressources. Langue : incontournable : italien, d'autres langues sont un plus ## Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos collaborateurs sont au cœur de notre réussite. Nous proposons des opportunités de développement attrayantes, un hébergement confortable, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages. Postulez maintenant ## Cuisinier - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Les gens à 1800 m d'altitude façonnent le voyage de luxe en montagne. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale propose à nos clients un Luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous embrassons notre culture : un luxe discret, de l’inspiration et une expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance de faire partie de notre culture de création : Votre missionVotre scène – notre cœur dans les coulisses : Dans notre hôtel, ce ne sont pas seulement nos clients qui occupent le devant de la scène – nos collaborateurs méritent également des moments culinaires inspirants. En tant que cuisinier dans notre nouveau restaurant du personnel, vous êtes à la fois hôte et expert culinaire. Avec une cuisine fraîche et créative et une oreille attentive aux souhaits de notre équipe, vous contribuez à ce que nos collègues se sentent vraiment chez eux. Vos responsabilités Élaborer des menus variés et équilibrés pour notre équipe – avec le souci du détail et la passion de la qualité Être un hôte au restaurant du personnel : accueillir, impliquer et créer une ambiance positive Planification des menus et mise en place de semaines thématiques culinaires – vos idées sont les bienvenues Combinaison du service buffet et du live cooking Assurer le bon fonctionnement de votre rayon – de la mise en place à la fermeture impeccable de la cuisine Respect des règles d'hygiène selon HACCP – la propreté est une seconde nature pour vous Collaboration étroite avec l'équipe de cuisine, les achats et les RH – pour assurer un grande expérience pour notre équipe C'est vous Une formation terminée en tant que chef certifié ou qualification équivalente Une expérience en cuisine chaude et froide, idéalement dans la restauration collective ou dans l'hôtellerie Une passion pour le travail avec les gens - vous aimez être hôte, même pour vos collègues Fortes capacités d'organisation, de résilience et un style de travail structuré Créativité dans la planification des menus - saisonniers, équilibrés et pleins de saveurs Bonnes compétences en allemand et en anglais, l'italien est un plus Si vous souhaitez combiner votre amour pour les arts culinaires avec une véritable mentalité d'hôte - et contribuer à l'un des plus beaux hôtels en Suisse – nous attendons avec impatience de recevoir votre candidature. AvantagesChez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous proposons des opportunités de développement attrayantes, un hébergement confortable, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages. ## Breakfast Cook/ Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Les gens à 1800 m d'altitude façonnent le voyage de luxe en montagne. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale propose à nos clients un Luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous embrassons notre culture : un luxe discret, de l’inspiration et une expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance de faire partie de notre culture de façonnage : c'est ce que vous faites avec nous. Il ne s'agit pas seulement de cuisiner ; il s'agit d'orchestrer le moment le plus important de la journée dans un environnement du plus haut niveau.Créativité au Buffet : Vous êtes responsable de la préparation et de la présentation de notre magnifique buffet quotidien. Des fruits frais tranchés avec précision aux petites pâtisseries les plus fines, chaque détail compte.Maître des plats à base d'œufs : Qu'il s'agisse d'omelettes moelleuses ou d'œufs Bénédicte parfaits, vous préparez les commandes à la carte avec maîtrise et rapidité.Qualité et soin : Vous veillez au stockage des matières premières et garantissez une fraîcheur absolue. L'ordre et l'hygiène (HACCP) sont votre carte de visite.Esprit d'équipe : Au besoin, vous soutenez activement les Chefs de Partie et travaillez ensemble pour maintenir nos excellents standards.début juin, fin ca. 06.04.2027 C'est toiLe lève-tôt attrape le ver. Pendant que les autres dorment encore, vous faites de votre mieux. Nous recherchons une personnalité ensoleillée qui aime tôt le matin et accompagne nos clients dans la journée avec énergie et sourire :Formation : Vous êtes un chef certifié ou avez au moins 2 ans d'expérience professionnelle spécifique dans ce domaine.Compétences : Vous maîtrisez diverses méthodes de cuisson et les arts de la pâtisserie du petit-déjeuner.Esprit : Vous mettez en œuvre les recettes standards de l'hôtel en toute confiance et avez le sens de l'amélioration continue.Fiabilité : La ponctualité, ainsi que le maintien d'une hygiène personnelle et d'un espace de travail propre, sont une seconde nature pour vous.Langues : italien ainsi que l'anglais ou l'allemand.Pourquoi Kronenhof :Travailler chez nous, c'est faire partie d'une légende de l'hospitalité suisse – dans un environnement où le talent est véritablement valorisé.Nous offrons un emploi stable dans l'un des endroits les plus exclusifs au monde.La vie en Engadine : nous vous soutenons pour la logistique ! Nous proposons des logements pour le personnel à des prix équitables et fixes, afin que vous puissiez profiter sans stress de la nature et des activités de Pontresina. Croissance : opportunités de formation et de développement continus. Souhaitez-vous apporter votre passion dans notre cuisine et faire briller le petit-déjeuner au Grand Hôtel Kronenhof ? Nous attendons avec impatience de recevoir votre candidature ! AvantagesChez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous proposons des opportunités de développement attrayantes, un hébergement confortable, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages. ## Maître de Rang (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Élevez votre carrière vers de nouveaux sommets à 1800 mètres d'altitude et devenez membre de la famille Kulm Group. Êtes-vous prêt à redéfinir l’expérience du voyage de luxe en montagne ? Rejoignez notre équipe dynamique et internationale du groupe Kulm, où ensemble nous offrons à nos clients une expérience de luxe unique et créons des souvenirs inoubliables. Pourquoi le Groupe Kulm ? Poursuite de l'excellence : L'excellence est au cœur de tout ce que nous faisons. Nous nous efforçons quotidiennement d'obtenir le meilleur et de ravir nos clients et nos employés. Équipe passionnée : Travaillez au sein d'une équipe internationale dynamique qui se soutient et s'inspire mutuellement. Faites l'expérience d'une véritable camaraderie et d'un esprit d'équipe avec nous. Opportunités de carrière : Libérez votre potentiel et évoluez avec nous. Nous nous engageons à votre développement personnel et professionnel.Culture unique : Plongez dans un environnement de travail qui valorise la créativité, la passion et l'authenticité. Ici, vous pouvez donner vie à vos idées et avoir un réel impact. Faites partie de quelque chose d'extraordinaire ! C'est ce que vous évoluez chez nous. Vous gérez votre section en toute confiance, assurant un service fluide avec le sourire et le souci du détail. Vous coordonnez votre équipe, déléguez des tâches et garantissez une exécution sans faille. Vous êtes un véritable hôte dans l'âme, conseillant nos clients internationaux sur les accords menu et vins. Vous assumez des tâches administratives telles que la planification des quarts de travail et la gestion des commandes avec efficacité et structure. C'est vousUne formation complète en gastronomie et une expérience dans l'hôtellerie de luxe ou la gastronomie haut de gamme.Expérience en leadership et capacité à motiver et inspirer votre équipe vers l'excellence.Compétences de communication exceptionnelles et enthousiasme pour travailler avec une clientèle internationale.De solides compétences organisationnelles, un sens élevé de la qualité et une volonté d'établir de nouvelles normes.Flexibilité, résilience et passion pour fournir un service exceptionnel.La maîtrise de l'allemand et de l'anglais est essentielle ; des langues supplémentaires sont un plus. Établissez de nouvelles normes en matière de gastronomie et devenez membre de notre équipe. Nous attendons votre candidature avec impatience ! AvantagesChez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous proposons des opportunités de développement attrayantes, un hébergement confortable, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages.

jobs.title: Chef de Rang  (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Chef de Rang  (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2025-12-02.

## This is what you move with us
Living Hospitality: You welcome and attend to our discerning regular guests, creating unforgettable moments at the highest level.
Organizational Talent: You coordinate the service area and ensure a seamless guest experience.
Perfection in Detail: You ensure everything in the restaurant runs flawlessly.
Classy Consulting: You provide expert advice to our guests on menu selection and give knowledgeable drink recommendations.
Quality over Quantity: You guarantee top-notch service and highest guest satisfaction.
Hygiene and Safety: You always adhere to the highest hygiene and safety standards.

## This is you
MUST HAVE: excellent German, very good English, ideally Italian.
Education and Experience: You have completed training in hospitality/gastronomy or have a comparable qualification, along with several years of experience in a high-end restaurant setting.
Communication and Teamwork: You have excellent communication skills and are a team player.
Host: You have a strong customer orientation and enjoy being a host.
Resilience and Flexibility: You remain resilient and flexible, even in stressful situations.
Appearance: Your well-groomed appearance and good manners complete your profile.
Expertise: You possess comprehensive knowledge in food and beverages.
Independence: You work independently and responsibly.

## Benefits
At the Kulm Group, our employees are the key to our success. We are renowned for our impeccable service as well as our passion for high-end luxury, winter sports, and haute cuisine. With us, you will not only find the perfect platform to advance your career but also an outstanding employee experience with numerous amenities and benefits.

        
            Apply now

## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Breakfast Cook/ Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usIt is not just about cooking; it is about orchestrating the most important moment of the day in an environment of the highest standard.Creativity at the Buffet: You are responsible for the preparation and presentation of our magnificent daily buffet. From precisely sliced fresh fruits to the finest small pastries – every detail matters.Master of Egg Dishes: Whether it is fluffy omelets or perfect Eggs Benedict – you prepare à la carte orders with mastery and speed.Quality and Care: You oversee the storage of raw materials and guarantee absolute freshness. Order and hygiene (HACCP) are your calling card.Team Spirit: When needed, you actively support the Chefs de Partie and work together to maintain our excellent standards.start June, end ca. 06.04.2027
This is youThe early bird catches the worm. While others are still slumbering, you are performing at your best. We are looking for a sunny personality who loves the early morning and accompanies our guests into the day with energy and a smile:Education: You are a certified chef or have at least 2 years of specific professional experience in this field.Skills: You have mastered various cooking methods and breakfast pastry arts.Mindset: You implement the hotel's standard recipes with confidence and have an eye for continuous improvement.Reliability: Punctuality, as well as maintaining personal hygiene and a clean workspace, are second nature to you.Languages: Italian as well as English or German.Why Kronenhof:Working with us means becoming part of a legend in Swiss hospitality – in an environment where talent is truly valued.We offer stable employment in one of the most exclusive locations in the world.Life in the Engadin: We support you with the logistics! We provide staff housing at fair, fixed prices, so you can enjoy the nature and activities in Pontresina stress-free.Growth: Continuous training and development opportunities.Would you like to bring your passion into our kitchen and make breakfast at the Grand Hotel Kronenhof shine? We look forward to receiving your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Maître de Rang (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            Elevate your career to new heights at 1800 meters above sea level and become part of the Kulm Group family.  Are you ready to redefine the luxury mountain travel experience? Join our dynamic and international team at Kulm Group, where together we provide our guests with a unique luxury experience and create unforgettable memories.  Why Kulm Group?Pursuit of Excellence: Excellence is at the heart of everything we do. We strive daily to achieve the best and delight our guests and employees.Passionate Team: Work in a vibrant, international team that supports and inspires each other. Experience true camaraderie and team spirit with us.Career Opportunities: Unlock your potential and grow with us. We are committed to your personal and professional development.Unique Culture: Immerse yourself in a work environment that values creativity, passion, and authenticity. Here, you can bring your ideas to life and make a real impact.  Be part of something extraordinary!
This is what you move with usYou confidently manage your section, ensuring seamless service with a smile and attention to detail.You coordinate your team, delegate tasks, and guarantee flawless execution.You are a true host at heart, advising our international guests on menu and wine pairings.You take on administrative tasks such as shift planning and order management with efficiency and structure.You introduce fresh ideas and create innovative guest experiences that leave a lasting impression.You share your expertise with your team, continuously fostering training and development.
This is youA completed education in fine dining and experience in luxury hospitality or high-end gastronomy.Leadership experience and the ability to motivate and inspire your team to excellence.Outstanding communication skills and enthusiasm for working with an international clientele.Strong organizational skills, a high sense of quality, and a drive to set new standards.Flexibility, resilience, and a passion for delivering exceptional service.Fluency in German and English is essential; additional languages are a plus.Set new standards in fine dining and become part of our team. We look forward to your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.it: Chef de Rang (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Grigioni). Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2025-12-02. # Questo è ciò che ti muovi con noi Living Hospitality: Accogliete e assistete ai nostri ospiti abituali, creando momenti indimenticabili al massimo livello. Talent organizzativo: Coordinate l'area di servizio e assicurate un'esperienza perfetta per gli ospiti. Perfezione in dettaglio: Assicurarsi che tutto nel ristorante funziona perfettamente. Consulenza di classe: L'utente fornisce consulenza esperta ai nostri ospiti nella scelta del menu e fornisce raccomandazioni di bevande informate. Qualità su Quantità: Garantisci un servizio di prim'ordine e la massima soddisfazione degli ospiti. Igiene e sicurezza: aderisci sempre ai più elevati standard di igiene e sicurezza. # Questo è che dovete avere: tedesco eccellente, inglese molto buono, idealmente italiano. Istruzione ed esperienza: Hai completato la formazione in ospitalità/gastronomia o hai una qualifica simile, insieme a diversi anni di esperienza in un ambiente ristorante di fascia alta. Comunicazione e lavoro di squadra: Hai eccellenti capacità di comunicazione e sei un giocatore di squadra. Host: Hai un forte orientamento del cliente e godere di essere un ospite. Resilienza e Flessibilità: Restate resilienti e flessibili, anche in situazioni stressanti. Aspetto: Il tuo aspetto ben curato e buone maniere completano il tuo profilo. Competenza: Lei possiede una conoscenza completa in cibo e bevande. Indipendenza: Lei lavora in modo indipendente e responsabile. ## Benefits At the Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono la chiave del nostro successo. Siamo rinomati per il nostro servizio impeccabile e la nostra passione per il lusso di fascia alta, gli sport invernali e la cucina di alta qualità. Con noi, non solo troverete la piattaforma perfetta per far progredire la vostra carriera, ma anche un'esperienza dipendente eccezionale con numerosi servizi e vantaggi. ## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno modellando il Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti smart Luxury per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del gruppo Luxury Kulm fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: La vostra tappa MissionYour – il nostro cuore dietro le quinte: Nel nostro hotel, non sono solo i nostri ospiti che prendono il centro del palco – i nostri dipendenti meritano anche momenti culinari che ispirano. Come Cook nel nostro recentemente stabilito Staff Restaurant, siete entrambi ospiti e esperti culinari. Con una cucina fresca e creativa e un orecchio aperto per i desideri del nostro team, aiuta a garantire che i nostri colleghi si sentano veramente a casa. Preparazione di menu vari e bilanciati per il nostro team – con attenzione ai dettagli e passione per la qualità Essendo un ospite nel ristorante del personale: accogliente, coinvolgente, e creando un'atmosfera positiva Pianificazione del menu e implementazione di settimane a tema culinario – le vostre idee sono benvenute Combinazione di servizio a buffet e cucina dal vivo Garantire operazioni fluide nella vostra sezione – dall'accoglienza alla chiusura senza macchia della cucina Questa è la formazione completa come chef certificato o qualifica equivalente Esperienza in cucina calda e fredda, idealmente nella ristorazione comunale o nell'industria alberghiera Una passione per lavorare con le persone - ti piace essere un ospite, anche per i tuoi colleghi Forte capacità organizzative, resilienza e uno stile di lavoro strutturato Creatività nella pianificazione del menu - stagionale, equilibrato, e pieno di sapore Buone competenze tedesche e inglesi, Italiano è un plus Se volete combinare il vostro amore per le arti culinarie con una vera mentalità ospite – e contribuire a uno dei più bei hotel in Svizzera – non vediamo l'ora di ricevere la vostra applicazione.
