Possibilités de carrière : Débloquez votre potentiel et grandissez avec nous. Nous sommes engagés dans votre développement personnel et professionnel. Culture unique : Plongez-vous dans un environnement de travail qui valorise la créativité, la passion et l'authenticité. Ici, vous pouvez donner vie à vos idées et faire un impact réel. Faites partie de quelque chose d'extraordinaire ! C'est ce que vous déménagez avec nousVous gérez votre section avec confiance, assurant un service sans faille avec un sourire et une attention aux détails. Vous coordonnez votre équipe, vous délèguez des tâches et vous garantissez une exécution parfaite. Vous êtes un véritable hôte au cœur, conseillant nos invités internationaux sur le menu et les accords de vin. Vous assumez des tâches administratives telles que la planification des quarts et la gestion des commandes avec efficacité et structure. Vous présentez de nouvelles idées et créez des expériences innovantes qui laissent une impression durable. Vous partagez votre expertise avec votre équipe, favorisant continuellement la formation et le développement. C'est vousUne formation complète dans la restauration fine et l'expérience dans l'hospitalité de luxe ou la gastronomie haut de gamme. Expérience de leadership et capacité de motiver et d'inspirer votre équipe à l'excellence. Compétences de communication exceptionnelles et enthousiasme pour travailler avec une clientèle internationale. Des compétences organisationnelles solides, un sens élevé de la qualité et un effort pour établir de nouvelles normes. Flexibilité, résilience et passion pour un service exceptionnel. La maîtrise de l'allemand et de l'anglais est essentielle; les langues supplémentaires sont un plus. Établir de nouvelles normes dans les restaurants fins et faire partie de notre équipe. Nous nous réjouissons de votre candidature! Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages.

jobs.title: Chef de Rang (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Chef de Rang (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-10.

## This is what you move with us
Welcome guests at the highest level and ensure the best guest experience
Leading a team of Commis de Rang and service staff
Ensuring a smooth service flow
Advising guests on the selection of food and beverages according to their preferences and restrictions
Ensuring compliance with service standards and guidelines of the hotel group
Responsible for the proper setting and decoration of tables
Active involvement in the development of new menus and food cards

## This is you
Completed education in the gastronomy sector or equivalent professional experience
Several years of experience in the service sector, preferably in upscale gastronomy
Strong communication skills and a friendly demeanor
Ability to motivate and guide a team
Good knowledge of wine and beverages is advantageous
High resilience and the ability to ensure excellent service even under pressure
Willingness to work flexible hours, including weekends and holidays
Very good German language skills, ideally also English or Italian

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Breakfast Cook/ Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usIt is not just about cooking; it is about orchestrating the most important moment of the day in an environment of the highest standard.Creativity at the Buffet: You are responsible for the preparation and presentation of our magnificent daily buffet. From precisely sliced fresh fruits to the finest small pastries – every detail matters.Master of Egg Dishes: Whether it is fluffy omelets or perfect Eggs Benedict – you prepare à la carte orders with mastery and speed.Quality and Care: You oversee the storage of raw materials and guarantee absolute freshness. Order and hygiene (HACCP) are your calling card.Team Spirit: When needed, you actively support the Chefs de Partie and work together to maintain our excellent standards.start June, end ca. 06.04.2027
This is youThe early bird catches the worm. While others are still slumbering, you are performing at your best. We are looking for a sunny personality who loves the early morning and accompanies our guests into the day with energy and a smile:Education: You are a certified chef or have at least 2 years of specific professional experience in this field.Skills: You have mastered various cooking methods and breakfast pastry arts.Mindset: You implement the hotel's standard recipes with confidence and have an eye for continuous improvement.Reliability: Punctuality, as well as maintaining personal hygiene and a clean workspace, are second nature to you.Languages: Italian as well as English or German.Why Kronenhof:Working with us means becoming part of a legend in Swiss hospitality – in an environment where talent is truly valued.We offer stable employment in one of the most exclusive locations in the world.Life in the Engadin: We support you with the logistics! We provide staff housing at fair, fixed prices, so you can enjoy the nature and activities in Pontresina stress-free.Growth: Continuous training and development opportunities.Would you like to bring your passion into our kitchen and make breakfast at the Grand Hotel Kronenhof shine? We look forward to receiving your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            Elevate your career to new heights at 1800 meters above sea level and become part of the Kulm Group family.  Are you ready to redefine the luxury mountain travel experience? Join our dynamic and international team at Kulm Group, where together we provide our guests with a unique luxury experience and create unforgettable memories.  Why Kulm Group?Pursuit of Excellence: Excellence is at the heart of everything we do. We strive daily to achieve the best and delight our guests and employees.Passionate Team: Work in a vibrant, international team that supports and inspires each other. Experience true camaraderie and team spirit with us.Career Opportunities: Unlock your potential and grow with us. We look forward to your application!

jobs.title: Commis de Rang/ Assistant Waiter  (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Commis de Rang/ Assistant Waiter  (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
Exclusive Guest Service: You will be the face of our service area, delighting our discerning guests with exceptional service. From the moment they arrive to their departure, you will be the point of contact for all their needs.
Mise-en-place Preparation: Perfect preparation is key. You will ensure that your station is immaculate and that everything is in place before the guests arrive.
Seamless Service Support: You will work hand-in-hand with your Chef de Rang to ensure a fluid and elegant service flow. This includes the professional serving and clearing of courses, as well as maintaining a watchful eye on the "silent" needs of our guests, such as water and bread service.

## This is you
Experience in Luxury Hospitality: You bring experience from renowned hotels and understand the high standards expected in a 5-star establishment.
Language Skills: You are fluent in German and/or English, ideally you speak Italian as well. Any additional languages you speak are a plus, helping you better serve our international clientele.
Excellent Manners: With your well-groomed appearance and outstanding manners, you leave a lasting impression on our guests.
Passion for Perfection: You have an eye for detail and strive for perfection in everything you do. Your enthusiasm for the job is reflected in the quality of your work.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.it: Commis de Rang/Assistente cameriere (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadina, Grigioni). Penale: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / contratto di 10 mesi. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01. ## Questo è ciò che ti muovi con noi Servizio esclusivo per gli ospiti: sarai il volto della nostra area di servizio, deliziando i nostri ospiti esigenti con un servizio eccezionale. Dal momento del loro arrivo alla partenza sarai il punto di contatto per tutte le loro esigenze. Preparazione mise-en-place: la preparazione perfetta è la chiave. Ti assicurerai che la tua postazione sia immacolata e che tutto sia a posto prima dell'arrivo degli ospiti. Supporto al servizio senza soluzione di continuità: lavorerai fianco a fianco con il tuo Chef de Rang per garantire un flusso di servizio fluido ed elegante. Ciò include il servizio e lo smaltimento professionale delle portate, nonché il mantenimento di un occhio attento alle esigenze "silenziosi" dei nostri ospiti, come il servizio dell'acqua e del pane. ## Questa è la tua esperienza nell'ospitalità di lusso: porti l'esperienza di hotel rinomati e comprendi gli elevati standard previsti in una struttura a 5 stelle. Competenze linguistiche: parli fluentemente tedesco e/o inglese, idealmente parli anche italiano. Eventuali lingue aggiuntive che parli sono un vantaggio e ti aiutano a servire meglio la nostra clientela internazionale. Eccellenti maniere: con il tuo aspetto curato e le tue maniere eccezionali lasci un ricordo indelebile nei nostri ospiti. Passione per la perfezione: hai un occhio per i dettagli e cerchi la perfezione in tutto ciò che fai. Il tuo entusiasmo per il lavoro si riflette nella qualità del tuo lavoro. ## Vantaggi Nel Kulm Group i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale e numerosi vantaggi. Candidati ora ## Cuoco - Ristorante dello staff (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Le persone a 1800 m sul livello del mare stanno dando forma al Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti lusso intelligente per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del Luxury Kulm Group sei parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente stimolante, unico e distintivo. E come tali, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso discreto, ispirazione ed esperienza di vita. Insieme, lo realizziamo. Questa è la tua occasione per far parte della nostra cultura dello shaping: La tua missione Il tuo palco – il nostro cuore dietro le quinte: nel nostro hotel non sono solo i nostri ospiti ad essere al centro della scena: anche i nostri dipendenti meritano momenti culinari che ispirino. In qualità di cuoco nel nostro Staff Restaurant di nuova creazione, sei sia ospite che esperto culinario. Con una cucina fresca e creativa e un orecchio aperto ai desideri del nostro team, contribuisci a garantire che i nostri colleghi si sentano veramente a casa. L'ordre et l'hygiène (HACCP) sont votre carte de visite.Esprit d'équipe : Au besoin, vous soutenez activement les Chefs de Partie et travaillez ensemble pour maintenir nos excellents standards.début juin, fin ca. 06.04.2027 C'est toiLe lève-tôt attrape le ver. Pendant que les autres dorment encore, vous faites de votre mieux. Nous recherchons une personnalité ensoleillée qui aime tôt le matin et accompagne nos clients dans la journée avec énergie et sourire :Formation : Vous êtes un chef certifié ou avez au moins 2 ans d'expérience professionnelle spécifique dans ce domaine.Compétences : Vous maîtrisez diverses méthodes de cuisson et les arts de la pâtisserie du petit-déjeuner.Esprit : Vous mettez en œuvre les recettes standards de l'hôtel en toute confiance et avez le sens de l'amélioration continue.Fiabilité : La ponctualité, ainsi que le maintien d'une hygiène personnelle et d'un espace de travail propre, sont une seconde nature pour vous.Langues : italien ainsi que l'anglais ou l'allemand.Pourquoi Kronenhof :Travailler chez nous, c'est faire partie d'une légende de l'hospitalité suisse – dans un environnement où le talent est véritablement valorisé.Nous offrons un emploi stable dans l'un des endroits les plus exclusifs au monde.La vie en Engadine : nous vous soutenons pour la logistique ! Nous proposons des logements pour le personnel à des prix équitables et fixes, afin que vous puissiez profiter sans stress de la nature et des activités de Pontresina. Croissance : opportunités de formation et de développement continus. Souhaitez-vous apporter votre passion dans notre cuisine et faire briller le petit-déjeuner au Grand Hôtel Kronenhof ? Nous attendons avec impatience de recevoir votre candidature ! AvantagesChez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous proposons des opportunités de développement attrayantes, un hébergement confortable, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages. ## Maître de Rang (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Élevez votre carrière vers de nouveaux sommets à 1800 mètres d'altitude et devenez membre de la famille Kulm Group. Êtes-vous prêt à redéfinir l’expérience du voyage de luxe en montagne ? Rejoignez notre équipe dynamique et internationale du groupe Kulm, où ensemble nous offrons à nos clients une expérience de luxe unique et créons des souvenirs inoubliables. Pourquoi le Groupe Kulm ? Poursuite de l'excellence : L'excellence est au cœur de tout ce que nous faisons. Nous nous efforçons quotidiennement d'obtenir le meilleur et de ravir nos clients et nos employés. Équipe passionnée : Travaillez au sein d'une équipe internationale dynamique qui se soutient et s'inspire mutuellement. Faites l'expérience d'une véritable camaraderie et d'un esprit d'équipe avec nous. Opportunités de carrière : Libérez votre potentiel et évoluez avec nous. Nous nous engageons à votre développement personnel et professionnel.Culture unique : Plongez dans un environnement de travail qui valorise la créativité, la passion et l'authenticité. Ici, vous pouvez donner vie à vos idées et avoir un réel impact. Faites partie de quelque chose d'extraordinaire ! C'est ce que vous évoluez chez nous. Vous gérez votre section en toute confiance, assurant un service fluide avec le sourire et le souci du détail. Vous coordonnez votre équipe, déléguez des tâches et garantissez une exécution sans faille. Vous êtes un véritable hôte dans l'âme, conseillant nos clients internationaux sur les accords menu et vins. Vous assumez des tâches administratives telles que la planification des quarts de travail et la gestion des commandes avec efficacité et structure. C'est vousUne formation complète en gastronomie et une expérience dans l'hôtellerie de luxe ou la gastronomie haut de gamme.Expérience en leadership et capacité à motiver et inspirer votre équipe vers l'excellence.Compétences de communication exceptionnelles et enthousiasme pour travailler avec une clientèle internationale.De solides compétences organisationnelles, un sens élevé de la qualité et une volonté d'établir de nouvelles normes.Flexibilité, résilience et passion pour fournir un service exceptionnel.La maîtrise de l'allemand et de l'anglais est essentielle ; des langues supplémentaires sont un plus. Établissez de nouvelles normes en matière de gastronomie et devenez membre de notre équipe. Nous attendons votre candidature avec impatience ! AvantagesChez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous proposons des opportunités de développement attrayantes, un hébergement confortable, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages.

jobs.title: Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## Your Mission
Your stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality
 Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere
  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome
 Combination of buffet service and live cooking
 Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure
 Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you
 Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew

## This is you
Completed training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification
 Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry
 A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues
 Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style
 Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor
 Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus
 If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Breakfast Cook/ Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usIt is not just about cooking; it is about orchestrating the most important moment of the day in an environment of the highest standard.Creativity at the Buffet: You are responsible for the preparation and presentation of our magnificent daily buffet. From precisely sliced fresh fruits to the finest small pastries – every detail matters.Master of Egg Dishes: Whether it is fluffy omelets or perfect Eggs Benedict – you prepare à la carte orders with mastery and speed.Quality and Care: You oversee the storage of raw materials and guarantee absolute freshness. Order and hygiene (HACCP) are your calling card.Team Spirit: When needed, you actively support the Chefs de Partie and work together to maintain our excellent standards.start June, end ca. 06.04.2027
This is youThe early bird catches the worm. While others are still slumbering, you are performing at your best. We are looking for a sunny personality who loves the early morning and accompanies our guests into the day with energy and a smile:Education: You are a certified chef or have at least 2 years of specific professional experience in this field.Skills: You have mastered various cooking methods and breakfast pastry arts.Mindset: You implement the hotel's standard recipes with confidence and have an eye for continuous improvement.Reliability: Punctuality, as well as maintaining personal hygiene and a clean workspace, are second nature to you.Languages: Italian as well as English or German.Why Kronenhof:Working with us means becoming part of a legend in Swiss hospitality – in an environment where talent is truly valued.We offer stable employment in one of the most exclusive locations in the world.Life in the Engadin: We support you with the logistics! We provide staff housing at fair, fixed prices, so you can enjoy the nature and activities in Pontresina stress-free.Growth: Continuous training and development opportunities.Would you like to bring your passion into our kitchen and make breakfast at the Grand Hotel Kronenhof shine? We look forward to receiving your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Maître de Rang (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            Elevate your career to new heights at 1800 meters above sea level and become part of the Kulm Group family.  Are you ready to redefine the luxury mountain travel experience? Join our dynamic and international team at Kulm Group, where together we provide our guests with a unique luxury experience and create unforgettable memories.  Why Kulm Group?Pursuit of Excellence: Excellence is at the heart of everything we do. We strive daily to achieve the best and delight our guests and employees.Passionate Team: Work in a vibrant, international team that supports and inspires each other. Experience true camaraderie and team spirit with us.Career Opportunities: Unlock your potential and grow with us. We are committed to your personal and professional development.Unique Culture: Immerse yourself in a work environment that values creativity, passion, and authenticity. Here, you can bring your ideas to life and make a real impact.  Be part of something extraordinary!
This is what you move with usYou confidently manage your section, ensuring seamless service with a smile and attention to detail.You coordinate your team, delegate tasks, and guarantee flawless execution.You are a true host at heart, advising our international guests on menu and wine pairings.You take on administrative tasks such as shift planning and order management with efficiency and structure.You introduce fresh ideas and create innovative guest experiences that leave a lasting impression.You share your expertise with your team, continuously fostering training and development.
This is youA completed education in fine dining and experience in luxury hospitality or high-end gastronomy.Leadership experience and the ability to motivate and inspire your team to excellence.Outstanding communication skills and enthusiasm for working with an international clientele.Strong organizational skills, a high sense of quality, and a drive to set new standards.Flexibility, resilience, and a passion for delivering exceptional service.Fluency in German and English is essential; additional languages are a plus.Set new standards in fine dining and become part of our team. We look forward to your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Commis de Rang/ Assistant Waiter  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usExclusive Guest Service: You will be the face of our service area, delighting our discerning guests with exceptional service. From the moment they arrive to their departure, you will be the point of contact for all their needs.Mise-en-place Preparation: Perfect preparation is key. You will ensure that your station is immaculate and that everything is in place before the guests arrive.Seamless Service Support: You will work hand-in-hand with your Chef de Rang to ensure a fluid and elegant service flow. This includes the professional serving and clearing of courses, as well as maintaining a watchful eye on the "silent" needs of our guests, such as water and bread service.
This is youExperience in Luxury Hospitality: You bring experience from renowned hotels and understand the high standards expected in a 5-star establishment.Language Skills: You are fluent in German and/or English, ideally you speak Italian as well. Any additional languages you speak are a plus, helping you better serve our international clientele.Excellent Manners: With your well-groomed appearance and outstanding manners, you leave a lasting impression on our guests.Passion for Perfection: You have an eye for detail and strive for perfection in everything you do. Your enthusiasm for the job is reflected in the quality of your work.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

jobs.title: Driver  (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Driver  (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-10.

## This is what you move with us
Warm welcome for our guests: With your natural friendliness and charisma, you make every guest feel at home from the very first moment.
Valet parking: You park our guests' vehicles in the underground garage and manage garage logistics, always with attention to detail and order.
Guest transfers: Whether it’s from the ski lift or to the restaurant, you handle guest transfers with the hotel shuttle, ensuring a safe and pleasant ride.
Guest services: loading/ unloading the guests luggage and handling small errands as needed.

## This is you
Natural Friendliness and Charisma: You can almost anticipate the needs of our discerning guests and make every effort to ensure their stay is as pleasant as possible.
Groomed Appearance and Excellent Manners: You represent our hotel with style, impressing with professional politeness and an elegant demeanor.
Team Spirit and Flexibility: You enjoy working in a dynamic team, quickly adapting to various demands, always with a smile.
Valid Driver's License: Of course, you have a valid driver's license and feel comfortable maneuvering in tight parking spaces and on the road.
Language Skills: Ideally, you speak German and English, with additional languages (particularly Italian) being a welcome advantage.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Assistant Reservations Manager  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usYou are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration.
This is youProfessional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience.   Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales.   Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus.   Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm.   Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. Persönlichkeit: Ein hohes Verantwortungsgefühl, absolutes Ermessen und ein poliertes Aussehen, das unseren Luxusstandards entspricht. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, unsere Mitarbeiter sind das Herz unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, erschwingliche Mahlzeiten im Personalrestaurant und zahlreiche Getränke. Â Team Assistant Concierge and Guest Services (m/w/d) Kulm Hotel 100% Menschen auf 1800m Seehöhe prägen den Luxury Mountain Travel. Unsere dynamische und internationale Gemeinschaft bietet unseren Gästen smart Luxury für ein unnachahmliches Urlaubserlebnis. Als Mitglied der Luxury Kulm Group sind Sie Teil des Schlüssels für unseren Erfolg. Gemeinsam machen wir jeden Aufenthalt zutiefst inspirierend, einzigartig und unverwechselbar. Und als solche nehmen wir unsere Kultur an: unterschätzter Luxus, Inspiration und ein Lebenserlebnis. Gemeinsam schaffen wir es. Dies ist Ihre Chance, Mitglied unserer formgebenden Kultur zu sein: Dies ist, was Sie mit usHandling Guest Inquiries bewegen: Sie reagieren auf schriftliche und telefonische Anfragen professionell und serviceorientiert und arbeiten in enger Abstimmung mit dem Concierge Team. Administrative Unterstützung: Sie unterstützen das Concierge-Team im täglichen Betrieb durch zuverlässige Verwaltung von administrativen Aufgaben und Planungen. Datenverwaltung & Dokumentation: Sie halten Gastinformationen und interne Übersichten aufrecht und gewährleisten eine genaue und gut organisierte Dokumentation relevanter Daten. Prozessoptimierung: Sie identifizieren Möglichkeiten, Workflows zu optimieren und kleinere Automatisierungslösungen mit Tools wie Power Automate oder Zapier zu implementieren. Backoffice Koordination: Sie verfolgen Aufgaben, Termine und interne Kommunikation und sorgen für einen reibungslosen Informationsfluss innerhalb des Teams. Qualitätssicherung: Sie helfen dabei, die Werkzeuge und Systeme im Einsatz zu überwachen und Ideen zur Verbesserung des gesamten Gastserviceangebots beizutragen. Hier handelt es sich um einen strukturierten, selbstständigen Arbeitsstil mit einem starken Gefühl von Qualität, Diskretion und Zuverlässigkeit. Ausgezeichnete verbale und schriftliche Kommunikationsfähigkeiten in Deutsch und Englisch – jede zusätzliche Sprache, vor allem Italienisch, ist ein Plus. Eine Leidenschaft für Organisation, starke digitale Fähigkeiten und zuversichtliche Nutzung von MS Office-Anwendungen. Ein Service-getriebenes Mindset: Sie sehen sich als unterstützendes Teammitglied, das hinter den Kulissen arbeitet – und Sie wissen, dass hervorragende Gasterlebnisse auf einem ausgezeichneten Back Office aufgebaut sind. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, unsere Mitarbeiter sind das Herz unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, erschwingliche Mahlzeiten im Personalrestaurant und zahlreiche Getränke.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Conducteur (m/w/d) — Grand Hôtel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / contrat de 10 mois. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-10. - Oui. C'est ce que vous déménagez avec nous Accueil chaleureux pour nos invités: Avec votre convivialité naturelle et votre charisme, chaque invité se sent chez lui dès le premier moment. Service de voiturier: Vous garez les véhicules de nos clients dans le garage souterrain et gérez la logistique du garage, toujours avec attention au détail et à la commande. Transferts aux clients : Qu'il s'agisse de l'ascenseur de ski ou du restaurant, vous gérez les transferts des clients avec la navette de l'hôtel, assurant un trajet sûr et agréable. Services aux clients: chargement/déchargement des bagages des clients et manutention de petites courses au besoin. - Oui. C'est vous Amabilité naturelle et Charisme: Vous pouvez presque anticiper les besoins de nos clients éclairés et faire tout votre possible pour que leur séjour soit le plus agréable possible. Comparance groomed et Excellent Manners : Vous représentez notre hôtel avec style, impressionnant avec politesse professionnelle et un comportement élégant. Esprit d'équipe et flexibilité : Vous aimez travailler dans une équipe dynamique, s'adapter rapidement à diverses exigences, toujours avec un sourire. Permis de conduire valide : Bien sûr, vous avez un permis de conduire valide et vous sentez à l'aise manoeuvrer dans des espaces de stationnement serrés et sur la route. Compétences linguistiques: Idéalement, vous parlez l'allemand et l'anglais, avec des langues supplémentaires (surtout l'italien) étant un avantage de bienvenue. ## Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages. Appliquer maintenant ## Assistant Reservations Manager (m/w/d) Grand Hôtel Kronenhof 100% Les personnes à 1800m d'altitude façonnent le Luxury Mountain Travel. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos clients un luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous acceptons notre culture : luxe sous-estimé, inspiration et expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance d'être membre de notre culture de mode : C'est ce que vous déménagez avec nousVous êtes la voix de notre hôtel: Que ce soit par téléphone ou par e-mail, vous créez des offres convaincantes, confirmez les réservations et assurez-vous que les suivis sont traités avec précision – le tout conforme aux normes LHW et ISO. Vous pensez en termes d'occupation et d'opportunité: Vous gardez notre plan de réservation précis et à jour, contribuant activement à l'utilisation optimale de notre inventaire de chambre. Vous donnez vie aux chiffres : En étroite collaboration avec le gestionnaire adjoint exécutif et le gestionnaire de l'administration centrale, vous élaborez des prévisions et des rapports essentiels à la planification quotidienne. Vous êtes méticuleux avec les données: Les profils et bases de données des invités sont tenus à jour avec soin et discrétion – la structure et la conformité font partie de votre ADN. Vous restez devant la courbe : De la gestion du système Channel Manager à l'affinage continu de nos normes ISO et RIMS, vous assurez un bon fonctionnement et apportez de nouvelles idées à la table. Vous transformez le potentiel en performance: La vente est plus qu'une tâche pour vous – c'est un moyen d'améliorer le voyage des invités et de créer une valeur ajoutée significative. Pourquoi nous rejoindre ? Parce que vous allez faire partie de l'un des hôtels les plus renommés de Suisse – un endroit où vous ne travaillez pas, vous aidez à façonner l'avenir. Vous serez entouré de professionnels passionnés et vivrez une culture d'équipe définie par l'élégance, l'authenticité et la collaboration. Voici votre formation professionnelle: Vous avez suivi une formation professionnelle en hospitalité ou dans un domaine commercial – idéalement au sein de l'hospitalité de luxe – et vous offrez plusieurs années d'expérience pertinente. État d'esprit des ventes: Vous comprenez ce qui motive les décisions de réservation et comment élever l'expérience des clients à travers les ventes de chambres stratégiques. Compétences linguistiques : Vous parlez et écrivez couramment en allemand et en anglais; une connaissance supplémentaire du français ou de l'italien est un plus. Composure & clarté: Que ce soit sous pression ou en communication directe avec les clients, vous restez professionnel, efficace et chaleureux. Orientation vers la croissance & #160;: Vous êtes impatient non seulement de répondre aux attentes, mais d'améliorer les processus et d'investir dans votre propre développement. Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages. ## Nachtportier/ Auditeur de nuit (m/w/d) Grand Hôtel Kronenhof 100% Les personnes à 1800m d'altitude façonnent le Luxury Mountain Travel. Service de voiturier et de bagages: Parking des véhicules invités dans le garage ainsi que de l'aide pour le service de bagages et de chambres. Audit de nuit : Compléter la fermeture quotidienne du système (Opera Cloud), vérifier les rapports des points de vente et gérer le traitement physique des espèces pour le service comptable. Sécurité & Contrôle & #160;: Effectuer régulièrement des rondes de sécurité, surveiller le panneau d'alarme incendie et assurer la paix et la tranquillité nocturnes dans l'ensemble des locaux. Préparation: Générer des rapports département, acheter et poster des journaux, et fournir des services de cire de chaussures pour nos invités. C'est vousExpérience: Une solide expérience dans l'industrie hôtelière (de préférence dans le segment 5 étoiles) et idéalement une expérience antérieure dans les équipes de nuit. Les Compétence : Gestion fiable des systèmes PMS (Opera Cloud) ainsi que des applications MS Office standard. Langues : Connaissance de l'allemand et de l'anglais ; la connaissance de l'italien est un avantage important en raison de notre emplacement et de notre clientèle. Engagement : Un permis de conduire valide et l'aptitude physique requise pour les rondes de sécurité et la manutention des bagages. Personnalité : Un haut sens des responsabilités, une discrétion absolue et une apparence polie qui répond à nos standards de luxe. Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages. ## Team Assistant Concierge and Guest Services (m/w/d) Kulm Hotel 100% Les personnes à 1800m au-dessus du niveau de la mer façonnent le voyage de montagne de luxe. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale offre à nos clients un luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous acceptons notre culture : luxe sous-estimé, inspiration et expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance d'être membre de notre culture de mode : Voici ce que vous déménagez avec nous. Vous répondez aux demandes écrites et téléphoniques de manière professionnelle et axée sur le service, en étroite coordination avec l'équipe de conciergerie. Appui administratif : Vous aidez l'équipe de conciergerie dans les opérations quotidiennes en gérant de manière fiable les tâches administratives et l'horaire. Gestion des données et documentation : Vous maintenez l'information des invités et des aperçus internes, assurant une documentation précise et bien organisée des données pertinentes. Optimisation du processus : Vous identifiez les possibilités de rationaliser les flux de travail et de mettre en œuvre des solutions d'automatisation mineures à l'aide d'outils tels que Power Automate ou Zapier. Coordination des services administratifs : Vous surveillez les tâches, les délais et la communication interne, assurant ainsi un flux d'information en douceur au sein de l'équipe. Assurance qualité : Vous aidez à surveiller les outils et les systèmes utilisés et à apporter des idées pour améliorer l'offre globale de services aux clients. C'est vousUn style de travail structuré et autonome avec un fort sens de la qualité, de la discrétion et de la fiabilité. Excellentes compétences en communication orale et écrite en allemand et en anglais – toute langue supplémentaire, en particulier l'italien, est un plus. Une passion pour l'organisation, de solides compétences numériques et l'utilisation confiante des applications MS Office. Un état d'esprit axé sur le service : vous vous voyez comme un membre de l'équipe de soutien travaillant dans les coulisses – et vous savez que les expériences exceptionnelles des invités sont construites sur un excellent back office. Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages.

jobs.title: Florist (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Florist (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
Responsible for all floral arrangements in our hotel, including creating centerpieces, bouquets, etc.
Decorating public spaces not only for daily use but also for special occasions such as holidays, gala events, private functions, etc.
Organizing and advising on outdoor landscaping
Proper care of flowers and green plants
Procurement of all flowers, plants, and materials
Concept development and implementation while adhering to the specified budget

## This is you
You have successfully completed training in floristry and have several years of experience (preferably in the hotel industry)
With a creative flair, you know how to delight our guests with your floral decorations and create an impressive atmosphere and unique ambiance within and outside our luxury hotel
You are flexible, appreciate good communication, and are accustomed to working independently.
Even under pressure, you remain composed and calm, and you have a natural and friendly demeanor towards guests and colleagues.
Languages: English or German

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Pool Attendant/ Life Guard (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usCreating perfect pool moments: You ensure smooth operations in the pool and sauna area while keeping every detail in view.A host at heart: With a warm smile, you welcome our guests and look after them attentively throughout the entire spa and pool area.Hygiene at the highest level: You maintain cleanliness and order throughout the spa and carry out daily quality checks.Shaping moments of well-being: With your additional skills in sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for our younger guests, you actively contribute to their relaxation experience and joy in the water.
This is youHolder of the “Brevet Plus Pool” (SLRG) with solid first-aid knowledge.Experience in pool operations as well as skills in conducting sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for children.Excellent German and English skills; additional languages are an advantage.An attentive, warm personality with a strong sense of service and that special something that delights guests.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Florist (m/w/d)
Kulm Hotel
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usThe Kulm Hotel is world-renowned for its magnificent halls and meticulous attention to detail. As the right hand to our Head Florist, you will play a key role in transforming our hotel into a blooming masterpiece. You are more than a florist – you are an ambassador of aesthetics and elegance.Your Mission:Creative Staging: You will take a leading role in the entire floral design—from delicate table arrangements to grand, imposing bouquets for our most exclusive suites.Event Highlights: Showcase your skills in large-scale floral design during glamorous weddings, gala evenings, and major seasonal projects (such as our legendary Christmas and New Year's Eve decorations).Perfection in Detail: You ensure a consistently flawless appearance of all arrangements and green plants, both indoors and outdoors.Taking Responsibility: You support the department head operationally, coordinate flower deliveries, and ensure that our high quality standards are felt in every single arrangement.Start Date: June 1st, 2026 
This is youFoundation: You have a completed vocational training as a Florist and initial professional experience in the field.Creative Passion: You have a sharp eye for colors, shapes, and current trends. Your goal is to create an "imposing atmosphere" for our international guests.Composure: Even during major events and high-volume periods, you work precisely and efficiently, always maintaining an eye for the smallest detail.Personality: Your appearance is as polished as your floral work. You are a proactive communicator within the team and a warm point of contact for our guests.Languages: You are able to communicate effectively in either German or English.Why the Kulm Group? We offer you a stage for your creativity in one of the most exclusive locations in the world. Become part of a team that values true craftsmanship, encourages initiative, and thrives in a culture of mutual respect and team spirit.Are you ready to make the Kulm bloom? We look forward to receiving your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Spa Therapist (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usPamper our guests with professional spa treatments such as sports massages, signature massages, body scrubs, wraps, and baths.With your sense for individual needs, you will advise our guests on spa services and high-quality skincare products.Provide unforgettable well-being experiences through first-class care and attentive service.Support the spa team at the reception with appointment scheduling, ensuring smooth operations.Use your sales flair to recommend suitable home care products, boosting spa revenue.Ensure the highest hygiene and safety standards throughout the spa and fitness area.
This is youCompleted training as a massage therapist or a comparable qualification in the spa and wellness field.Additional certifications (e.g., Thai massage, Shiatsu, Lomi Lomi, reflexology, lymphatic drainage) are an advantage.Ideally, experience in fitness classes such as yoga or Pilates.Proven experience in the spa sector, preferably in luxury hospitality.Excellent communication skills in German and English and a sensitivity to the wishes of our guests.Flexibility to work weekends, holidays, and special events like our Night Spa.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.it: Fioraio (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadina, Grigioni). Penale: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / contratto di 10 mesi. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01. ## Questo è ciò che ti muovi con noi Responsabile di tutte le composizioni floreali nel nostro hotel, inclusa la creazione di centrotavola, bouquet, ecc. Decorazione di spazi pubblici non solo per l'uso quotidiano ma anche per occasioni speciali come vacanze, eventi di gala, funzioni private, ecc. Organizzazione e consulenza sul paesaggio esterno Cura adeguata di fiori e piante verdi Approvvigionamento di tutti i fiori, piante e materiali Sviluppo e implementazione del concetto rispettando il budget specificato ## Questo sei tu Hai completato con successo la formazione in floristica e hai diversi anni di esperienza (preferibilmente nel settore alberghiero) Con un estro creativo, sai come deliziare i nostri ospiti con le tue decorazioni floreali e creare un'atmosfera suggestiva e un ambiente unico all'interno e all'esterno del nostro hotel di lusso Sei flessibile, apprezzi la buona comunicazione e sei abituato a lavorare in modo indipendente. Ceci est vousUne formation complétée en tant que massothérapeute ou un diplôme comparable dans le domaine du spa et du bien-être.Des certifications supplémentaires (par exemple, massage thaïlandais, Shiatsu, Lomi Lomi, réflexologie, drainage lymphatique) sont un avantage.Idéalement, une expérience dans des cours de fitness tels que le yoga ou le Pilates.Expérience avérée dans le secteur du spa, de préférence dans l'hôtellerie de luxe.Excellentes compétences en communication en allemand et en anglais et sensibilité aux souhaits de nos clients.Flexibilité pour travailler les week-ends, les jours fériés et les événements spéciaux comme notre Nuit Spa. AvantagesChez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. jobs.description:
Florist (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
The Kulm Hotel is world-renowned for its magnificent halls and meticulous attention to detail. As the right hand to our Head Florist, you will play a key role in transforming our hotel into a blooming masterpiece. You are more than a florist – you are an ambassador of aesthetics and elegance.Your Mission:Creative Staging: You will take a leading role in the entire floral design—from delicate table arrangements to grand, imposing bouquets for our most exclusive suites.
Event Highlights: Showcase your skills in large-scale floral design during glamorous weddings, gala evenings, and major seasonal projects (such as our legendary Christmas and New Year's Eve decorations).
Perfection in Detail: You ensure a consistently flawless appearance of all arrangements and green plants, both indoors and outdoors.
Taking Responsibility: You support the department head operationally, coordinate flower deliveries, and ensure that our high quality standards are felt in every single arrangement.
Start Date: June 1st, 2026

## This is you
Foundation: You have a completed vocational training as a Florist and initial professional experience in the field.
Creative Passion: You have a sharp eye for colors, shapes, and current trends. Your goal is to create an "imposing atmosphere" for our international guests.
Composure: Even during major events and high-volume periods, you work precisely and efficiently, always maintaining an eye for the smallest detail.
Personality: Your appearance is as polished as your floral work. You are a proactive communicator within the team and a warm point of contact for our guests.
Languages: You are able to communicate effectively in either German or English.
Why the Kulm Group? We offer you a stage for your creativity in one of the most exclusive locations in the world. Become part of a team that values true craftsmanship, encourages initiative, and thrives in a culture of mutual respect and team spirit.Are you ready to make the Kulm bloom? We look forward to receiving your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usCreating perfect pool moments: You ensure smooth operations in the pool and sauna area while keeping every detail in view.A host at heart: With a warm smile, you welcome our guests and look after them attentively throughout the entire spa and pool area.Hygiene at the highest level: You maintain cleanliness and order throughout the spa and carry out daily quality checks.Shaping moments of well-being: With your additional skills in sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for our younger guests, you actively contribute to their relaxation experience and joy in the water.
This is youHolder of the “Brevet Plus Pool” (SLRG) with solid first-aid knowledge.Experience in pool operations as well as skills in conducting sauna infusions, aqua gym and swimming lessons for children.Excellent German and English skills; additional languages are an advantage.An attentive, warm personality with a strong sense of service and that special something that delights guests.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usResponsible for all floral arrangements in our hotel, including creating centerpieces, bouquets, etc.Decorating public spaces not only for daily use but also for special occasions such as holidays, gala events, private functions, etc.Organizing and advising on outdoor landscapingProper care of flowers and green plantsProcurement of all flowers, plants, and materialsConcept development and implementation while adhering to the specified budget
This is youYou have successfully completed training in floristry and have several years of experience (preferably in the hotel industry)With a creative flair, you know how to delight our guests with your floral decorations and create an impressive atmosphere and unique ambiance within and outside our luxury hotelYou are flexible, appreciate good communication, and are accustomed to working independently.Even under pressure, you remain composed and calm, and you have a natural and friendly demeanor towards guests and colleagues.Languages: English or German
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.it: Fiorista (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01. # Questo è ciò che si muove con noi Il Kulm Hotel è di fama mondiale per le sue magnifiche sale e meticolosa attenzione ai dettagli. Come la mano destra al nostro fiorista capo, si giocherà un ruolo chiave nel trasformare il nostro hotel in un capolavoro fiorente. Sei più di un fiorista – sei un ambasciatore di estetica ed eleganza. La vostra missione: Creative Staging: Prenderai un ruolo di primo piano nell'intero design floreale—dall'allestimento di tavoli delicati a grandi mazzi imponenti per le nostre suite più esclusive. Eventi: Mostra le tue competenze nel design floreale su larga scala durante matrimoni glamour, serate di gala e grandi progetti stagionali (come le nostre decorazioni natalizie e Capodanno). Perfezione in dettaglio: Si garantisce un aspetto costantemente impeccabile di tutti gli arrangiamenti e piante verdi, sia all'interno che all'esterno. Assumere la responsabilità: Sostiene il capo reparto in modo operativo, coordina le consegne di fiori, e assicurarsi che i nostri standard di alta qualità sono sentiti in ogni singolo accordo. Data di inizio: 1 giugno, 2026 # Lei è la Fondazione: Hai una formazione professionale completa come fiorista e esperienza professionale iniziale nel settore. Passione creativa: Hai un occhio affilato per colori, forme e tendenze attuali. Il vostro obiettivo è quello di creare un'atmosfera "migliorante" per i nostri ospiti internazionali. Composure: Anche durante eventi importanti e periodi ad alto volume, si lavora con precisione ed efficienza, mantenendo sempre un occhio per i minimi dettagli. Personalità: Il tuo aspetto è lucido come il tuo lavoro floreale. Sei un comunicatore proattivo all'interno del team e un punto di contatto caldo per i nostri ospiti. Lingue: Siete in grado di comunicare efficacemente in tedesco o in inglese. Perché il gruppo Kulm? Vi offriamo un palcoscenico per la vostra creatività in una delle posizioni più esclusive del mondo. Diventa parte di un team che valorizza la vera artigianalità, incoraggia l'iniziativa e prospera in una cultura del rispetto reciproco e dello spirito di squadra. Sei pronto a far fiorire il Kulm? Non vediamo l'ora di ricevere la vostra applicazione! ## Benefits At Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi. ## Pool Attendant/ Life Guard (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno modellando il Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti smart Luxury per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del gruppo Luxury Kulm fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: Questo è quello che ti muovi con noiCreating momenti di piscina perfetti: Garantisci operazioni fluide nella piscina e nella zona sauna mantenendo ogni dettaglio in vista. Un ospite a cuore: Con un sorriso caldo, accogliate i nostri ospiti e curateli attentamente in tutta la zona spa e piscina. Igiene al massimo livello: Mantenete la pulizia e l'ordine in tutto il centro benessere e fate controlli di qualità giornalieri. I momenti di benessere: Con le vostre competenze aggiuntive in infusioni di sauna, palestra acqua e lezioni di nuoto per i nostri ospiti più giovani, contribuite attivamente alla loro esperienza di relax e gioia in acqua. Questo è YouHolder del “Brevet Plus Pool” (SLRG) con solida conoscenza di pronto soccorso. Esperienza nelle operazioni in piscina e competenze nella conduzione di infusioni di sauna, palestra acqua e lezioni di nuoto per i bambini. Eccellente tedesco e inglese competenze; lingue aggiuntive sono un vantaggio. Una personalità attenta e calorosa con un forte senso di servizio e quella speciale cosa che delizia gli ospiti. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi. ## Fiorista (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno modellando il Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti smart Luxury per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del gruppo Luxury Kulm fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: Questo è ciò che si muove con noiRisponsabile per tutte le composizioni floreali nel nostro hotel, tra cui la creazione di pezzi centrali, mazzi di fiori, ecc. Decorare spazi pubblici non solo per uso quotidiano ma anche per occasioni speciali come feste, eventi di gala, funzioni private, ecc. Organizzazione e consulenza su paesaggi esterni Cura corretta di fiori e piante verdi Approvvigionamento di tutti i fiori, le piante e i materiali Sviluppo e implementazione del concetto, aderendo al bilancio specificato Questo è il tuo Hai completato con successo la formazione in fioristi e hanno diversi anni di esperienza (preferibilmente nel settore alberghiero) Con un tocco creativo, sai come deliziare i nostri ospiti con le tue decorazioni floreali e creare un'atmosfera impressionante e un'atmosfera unica dentro e fuori il nostro hotel di lusso Sei flessibile, apprezzi la buona comunicazione, e sono abituati a lavorare indipendentemente. Anche sotto pressione, si rimane composti e calmi, e si dispone di un demeanor naturale e amichevole verso gli ospiti e colleghi. Lingue: Inglese o Tedesco Vantaggi A Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi. ## Spa Therapist (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% persone a 1800m sul livello del mare stanno modellando il Luxury Mountain Travel. La nostra comunità dinamica e internazionale offre ai nostri ospiti smart Luxury per un'esperienza di vacanza inimitabile. Come membro del gruppo Luxury Kulm fai parte della chiave del nostro successo. Insieme, rendiamo ogni soggiorno profondamente ispiratore, unico e distintivo. E come tale, abbracciamo la nostra cultura: lusso sobrio, ispirazione e un'esperienza di vita. Insieme, facciamo in modo che accada. Questa è la tua possibilità di essere un membro della nostra cultura di modellazione: Questo è quello che ti muovi con noiPamper i nostri ospiti con trattamenti termali professionali come massaggi sportivi, massaggi firma, scrub corpo, avvolge e bagni. Con il vostro senso per le esigenze individuali, si consiglia ai nostri ospiti sui servizi spa e prodotti per la cura della pelle di alta qualità. Fornire esperienze di benessere indimenticabili attraverso la cura di prima classe e il servizio attento. Sostenere il team spa alla reception con la pianificazione degli appuntamenti, assicurando operazioni fluide. Utilizza il tuo flair di vendita per consigliare i prodotti di assistenza domestica adatti, aumentando le entrate termiche. Assicurare i più elevati standard di igiene e sicurezza in tutto il centro benessere e fitness. Questa è la formazione completa come massaggiatore o una qualifica simile nel campo spa e benessere. Ulteriori certificazioni (ad esempio, massaggio tailandese, Shiatsu, Lomi Lomi, riflessologia, drenaggio linfatico) sono un vantaggio. Idealmente, esperienza in corsi di fitness come yoga o Pilates. Esperienza dimostrata nel settore spa, preferibilmente nell'ospitalità di lusso. Eccellente capacità di comunicazione in tedesco e inglese e una sensibilità ai desideri dei nostri ospiti. Flessibilità di lavorare fine settimana, vacanze e eventi speciali come il nostro Night Spa. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, sistemazioni confortevoli, pasti convenienti nel ristorante del personale, e numerosi vantaggi.
descriptionByLocale.de: Florist (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Saisonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01. oder Das ist, was Sie mit uns bewegen Das Kulm Hotel ist weltbekannt für seine herrlichen Hallen und sorgfältige Liebe zum Detail. Als rechte Hand zu unserem Head Florist spielen Sie eine Schlüsselrolle bei der Umwandlung unseres Hotels in ein blühendes Meisterwerk. Sie sind mehr als eine Floristin – Sie sind ein Botschafter von Ästhetik und Eleganz. Ihre Mission: Creative Staging: Sie werden eine führende Rolle in der gesamten floralen Design &mdash nehmen; von zarten Tisch-Anordnungen bis hin zu grandiosen, imposanten Sträußen für unsere exklusivsten Suiten. Veranstaltungshighlights: Zeigen Sie Ihre Fähigkeiten im großformatigen floralen Design bei glamourösen Hochzeiten, Galaabenden und großen saisonalen Projekten (wie unserer legendären Weihnachts- und Silvester-Dekoration). Perfektion im Detail: Sie sorgen für ein konsequent einwandfreies Aussehen aller Arrangements und Grünpflanzen, sowohl im Innen- als auch im Außenbereich. Verantwortung übernehmen: Sie unterstützen den Abteilungsleiter operativ, koordinieren Blumenlieferungen und stellen sicher, dass unsere hohen Qualitätsstandards in jeder einzelnen Anordnung gefühlt werden. Startdatum: 1. Juni, 2026 oder Hier sind Sie Stiftung: Sie haben eine abgeschlossene berufliche Ausbildung als Florist und erste Berufserfahrung auf dem Gebiet. Kreative Leidenschaft: Sie haben ein scharfes Auge für Farben, Formen und aktuelle Trends. Ihr Ziel ist es, eine "imposante Atmosphäre" für unsere internationalen Gäste zu schaffen. Abschluss: Auch bei großen Ereignissen und hochvolumigen Perioden arbeiten Sie präzise und effizient, halten immer ein Auge für das kleinste Detail. Persönlichkeit: Ihr Aussehen ist so poliert wie Ihr Blumenwerk. Sie sind ein proaktiver Kommunikator im Team und ein herzlicher Ansprechpartner für unsere Gäste. Sprachen: Sie können effektiv in Deutsch oder Englisch kommunizieren. Warum die Kulm-Gruppe? Wir bieten Ihnen eine Bühne für Ihre Kreativität in einer der exklusivsten Orte der Welt. Werden Sie Teil eines Teams, das wahre Handwerkskunst schätzt, Initiative fördert und in einer Kultur des gegenseitigen Respekts und des Teamgeistes gedeiht. Sind Sie bereit, die Kulm Blüte zu machen? Wir freuen uns auf Ihre Bewerbung! Vorteile Bei der Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeiter das Herz unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, erschwingliche Mahlzeiten im Personalrestaurant und zahlreiche Getränke. Bewerben Sie sich jetzt? Pool Attendant/ Life Guard (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100 % Menschen auf 1800m über dem Meeresspiegel prägen den Luxury Mountain Travel. Unsere dynamische und internationale Gemeinschaft bietet unseren Gästen smart Luxury für ein unnachahmliches Urlaubserlebnis. Als Mitglied der Luxury Kulm Group sind Sie Teil des Schlüssels für unseren Erfolg. Gemeinsam machen wir jeden Aufenthalt zutiefst inspirierend, einzigartig und unverwechselbar. Und als solche nehmen wir unsere Kultur an: unterschätzter Luxus, Inspiration und ein Lebenserlebnis. Gemeinsam schaffen wir es. Dies ist Ihre Chance, Mitglied unserer formgebenden Kultur zu sein: Dies ist, was Sie mit uns bewegenCreating perfekte Poolmomente: Sie sorgen für einen reibungslosen Betrieb im Pool- und Saunabereich und halten jedes Detail im Blick. Ein Gastgeber im Herzen: Mit einem warmen Lächeln begrüßen Sie unsere Gäste und kümmern sich um sie aufmerksam über den gesamten Wellness- und Poolbereich. Hygiene auf höchstem Niveau: Sie pflegen Sauberkeit und Bestellung im gesamten Spa und führen tägliche Qualitätskontrollen durch. Shaping Momente des Wohlbefindens: Mit Ihren zusätzlichen Fähigkeiten in Sauna-Infusionen, Aqua-Fitness und Schwimmunterricht für unsere jüngeren Gäste tragen Sie aktiv zu ihrer Entspannung und Freude im Wasser bei. descriptionByLocale.fr: Floriste (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonnelle / Saisonnier. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01. - Oui. C'est ce que vous déménagez avec nous L'Hôtel Kulm est mondialement reconnu pour ses magnifiques salles et son attention méticuleuse au détail. En tant que main droite à notre fleuriste de tête, vous jouerez un rôle clé dans la transformation de notre hôtel en un chef-d'œuvre fleuri. Vous êtes plus qu'un fleuriste – vous êtes un ambassadeur d'esthétique et d'élégance. Votre mission : Stagging créatif : Vous jouerez un rôle de premier plan dans l'ensemble de la décoration florale et mdash ; des arrangements de table délicats aux grands bouquets imposants pour nos suites les plus exclusives. Faits saillants de l'événement : Montrez vos compétences en design floral à grande échelle lors de mariages glamour, de soirées de gala et de grands projets saisonniers (comme nos légendaires décorations de Noël et du Nouvel An). Perfection en détail : Vous assurez une apparence toujours impeccable de toutes les dispositions et plantes vertes, à l'intérieur comme à l'extérieur. Prise de responsabilité : Vous soutenez le chef du département sur le plan opérationnel, coordonnez les livraisons de fleurs et veillez à ce que nos normes de qualité soient ressenties dans chaque arrangement. Date de début : 1er juin 2026 - Oui. Voici la Fondation : Vous avez une formation professionnelle complète en tant que fleuriste et expérience professionnelle initiale dans le domaine. Passion créative : Vous avez un œil vif pour les couleurs, les formes et les tendances actuelles. Votre objectif est de créer une « atmosphère d'impression » pour nos invités internationaux. Composition: Même pendant les événements majeurs et les périodes de grand volume, vous travaillez avec précision et efficacité, en gardant toujours un œil pour les moindres détails. Personnalité : Votre apparence est aussi polie que votre travail floral. Vous êtes un communicateur proactif au sein de l'équipe et un point de contact chaleureux pour nos invités. Langues: Vous pouvez communiquer efficacement en allemand ou en anglais. Pourquoi le groupe Kulm ? Nous vous offrons une scène pour votre créativité dans l'un des endroits les plus exclusifs du monde. Devenez membre d'une équipe qui valorise l'artisanat, encourage l'initiative et prospère dans une culture de respect mutuel et d'esprit d'équipe. Êtes-vous prêt à faire fleurir le Kulm ? Nous sommes impatients de recevoir votre candidature! ## Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des possibilités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables dans le restaurant du personnel, et de nombreux avantages. Et en tant que tel, nous embrassons notre culture : luxe sous-estimé, inspiration et expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. Un hôte au cœur : Avec un sourire chaleureux, vous accueillez nos invités et les soignez attentivement tout au long du spa et de la piscine. Hygiène au plus haut niveau: Vous gardez la propreté et l'ordre tout au long du spa et effectuez des contrôles de qualité quotidiens. Les moments de bien-être : Grâce à vos compétences supplémentaires en infusions de sauna, en gym aqua et en cours de natation pour nos jeunes clients, vous contribuez activement à leur expérience de détente et de joie dans l'eau.
