jobs.title: Food and Beverage Assistant (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Food and Beverage Assistant (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-04-01.

## This is what you move with us
In this versatile key position, you are the “Enabler” of our entire F&B division. You bridge the gap between administrative precision, cutting-edge hospitality technology, and front-of-house operations. You ensure that technical processes run flawlessly in the background while proactively supporting the F&B management in their daily business.Your Mission - Where Culinary Delight meets Logistics:Reservation Management: You are the primary point of contact for reservations (on-site, phone, email) via our software for all hotel outlets.
Menu Design & Coordination: In close collaboration with the kitchen, marketing, and restaurant management, you coordinate and update our menus via “Ai-web-to-print.”
Daily Operations: During the season, you create daily half-board menus, staff menus, and buffet labeling using “Ai-web-to-print” and “Viewneo.”
Guest Experiences: You process individual guest requests for aperitifs or birthdays, ensuring that "extra touch" that defines our service.
Amenity Management: Coordinate guest amenities with the Front Office and Room Service, including payment processing via “Saferpay” and “Opera.”
Front-Line Support: When needed, you actively support our team directly in service, staying close to our guests.
Quality Ambassador: You ensure compliance with the highest standards (LQA and Forbes Travel Guide) and professionally handle guest feedback and complaints.
Administrative Excellence: Preparation of corporate invoices and general correspondence (office share approx. 80–90%).

## This is you
Foundation: Completed hotel or commercial apprenticeship, as well as professional experience in a similar role, ideally within the luxury hospitality industry.
Linguistic Excellence: Business fluent in German and English (written and spoken). Italian is a significant asset.
IT Proficiency: Confident handling of MS Office and hotel systems (e.g., Opera Cloud).
Personality: You are an organizational talent with absolute reliability and discretion. You remain calm and solution-oriented, even under high pressure.
Host Mindset: You communicate at the highest service level, possess a poised appearance, and apply a “hands-on” mentality when it counts.
Why the Kulm Group? We offer you a workplace where tradition meets innovation. You will have the freedom to actively shape processes and benefit from the attractive perks of one of Switzerland's most renowned hotel groups.Ready to shape the F&B world of tomorrow? We look forward to receiving your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Breakfast Cook/ Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usIt is not just about cooking; it is about orchestrating the most important moment of the day in an environment of the highest standard.Creativity at the Buffet: You are responsible for the preparation and presentation of our magnificent daily buffet. From precisely sliced fresh fruits to the finest small pastries – every detail matters.Master of Egg Dishes: Whether it is fluffy omelets or perfect Eggs Benedict – you prepare à la carte orders with mastery and speed.Quality and Care: You oversee the storage of raw materials and guarantee absolute freshness. Order and hygiene (HACCP) are your calling card.Team Spirit: When needed, you actively support the Chefs de Partie and work together to maintain our excellent standards.start June, end ca. 06.04.2027
This is youThe early bird catches the worm. While others are still slumbering, you are performing at your best. We are looking for a sunny personality who loves the early morning and accompanies our guests into the day with energy and a smile:Education: You are a certified chef or have at least 2 years of specific professional experience in this field.Skills: You have mastered various cooking methods and breakfast pastry arts.Mindset: You implement the hotel's standard recipes with confidence and have an eye for continuous improvement.Reliability: Punctuality, as well as maintaining personal hygiene and a clean workspace, are second nature to you.Languages: Italian as well as English or German.Why Kronenhof:Working with us means becoming part of a legend in Swiss hospitality – in an environment where talent is truly valued.We offer stable employment in one of the most exclusive locations in the world.Life in the Engadin: We support you with the logistics! We provide staff housing at fair, fixed prices, so you can enjoy the nature and activities in Pontresina stress-free.Growth: Continuous training and development opportunities.Would you like to bring your passion into our kitchen and make breakfast at the Grand Hotel Kronenhof shine? We look forward to receiving your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Maître de Rang (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            Elevate your career to new heights at 1800 meters above sea level and become part of the Kulm Group family.  Are you ready to redefine the luxury mountain travel experience? Join our dynamic and international team at Kulm Group, where together we provide our guests with a unique luxury experience and create unforgettable memories.  Why Kulm Group?Pursuit of Excellence: Excellence is at the heart of everything we do. We strive daily to achieve the best and delight our guests and employees.Passionate Team: Work in a vibrant, international team that supports and inspires each other. Experience true camaraderie and team spirit with us.Career Opportunities: Unlock your potential and grow with us. We are committed to your personal and professional development.Unique Culture: Immerse yourself in a work environment that values creativity, passion, and authenticity. Here, you can bring your ideas to life and make a real impact.  Be part of something extraordinary!
This is what you move with usYou confidently manage your section, ensuring seamless service with a smile and attention to detail.You coordinate your team, delegate tasks, and guarantee flawless execution.You are a true host at heart, advising our international guests on menu and wine pairings.You take on administrative tasks such as shift planning and order management with efficiency and structure.You introduce fresh ideas and create innovative guest experiences that leave a lasting impression.You share your expertise with your team, continuously fostering training and development.
This is youA completed education in fine dining and experience in luxury hospitality or high-end gastronomy.Leadership experience and the ability to motivate and inspire your team to excellence.Outstanding communication skills and enthusiasm for working with an international clientele.Strong organizational skills, a high sense of quality, and a drive to set new standards.Flexibility, resilience, and a passion for delivering exceptional service.Fluency in German and English is essential; additional languages are a plus.Set new standards in fine dining and become part of our team. We look forward to your application!
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.it:
Food and Beverage Assistant (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-04-01.

## This is what you move with us
In this versatile key position, you are the “Enabler” of our entire F&B division. You bridge the gap between administrative precision, cutting-edge hospitality technology, and front-of-house operations. You ensure that technical processes run flawlessly in the background while proactively supporting the F&B management in their daily business.Your Mission - Where Culinary Delight meets Logistics:Reservation Management: You are the primary point of contact for reservations (on-site, phone, email) via our software for all hotel outlets.
Menu Design & Coordination: In close collaboration with the kitchen, marketing, and restaurant management, you coordinate and update our menus via “Ai-web-to-print.”
Daily Operations: During the season, you create daily half-board menus, staff menus, and buffet labeling using “Ai-web-to-print” and “Viewneo.”
Guest Experiences: You process individual guest requests for aperitifs or birthdays, ensuring that "extra touch" that defines our service.
Amenity Management: Coordinate guest amenities with the Front Office and Room Service, including payment processing via “Saferpay” and “Opera.”
Front-Line Support: When needed, you actively support our team directly in service, staying close to our guests.
Quality Ambassador: You ensure compliance with the highest standards (LQA and Forbes Travel Guide) and professionally handle guest feedback and complaints.
Administrative Excellence: Preparation of corporate invoices and general correspondence (office share approx. 80–90%).

## This is you
Foundation: Completed hotel or commercial apprenticeship, as well as professional experience in a similar role, ideally within the luxury hospitality industry.
Linguistic Excellence: Business fluent in German and English (written and spoken). Italian is a significant asset.
IT Proficiency: Confident handling of MS Office and hotel systems (e.g., Opera Cloud).
Personality: You are an organizational talent with absolute reliability and discretion. You remain calm and solution-oriented, even under high pressure.
Host Mindset: You communicate at the highest service level, possess a poised appearance, and apply a “hands-on” mentality when it counts.
Why the Kulm Group? We offer you a workplace where tradition meets innovation. You will have the freedom to actively shape processes and benefit from the attractive perks of one of Switzerland's most renowned hotel groups.Ready to shape the F&B world of tomorrow? We look forward to receiving your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

jobs.description:
Food and Beverage Director (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-02-01.

## This is what you move with us
Luxurious. Ambitious. Visionary. In this newly created key position, you will actively shape the culinary direction of our property as the strategic driving force behind our Food & Beverage concepts. In this role, you will design the future of our F&B world — visionary, bold, and with the ambition to take excellence to the next level. What makes this role unique:Leadership at eye level: You lead a team of seven experienced department heads and approximately 70 employees — with clarity, inspiration, and a genuine talent for developing people.
Concept architect & innovator: You evaluate existing concepts, develop new ideas, identify F&B trends and deliberately leverage them. You think on the next level and create experiences that excite our guests.
Strategy meets profitability: Budgeting, forecasting, margin optimization — your decisions are data-driven while always keeping the guest experience at the forefront.
Operational excellence: You establish quality standards, simplify processes, implement new tools, and modernize systems. For you, efficiency is a result of strong leadership.
Connector & multiplier: You act as a strategic partner to General Management, Culinary, Marketing, Sales, and Events — with foresight, professionalism, and outstanding communication skills.
Creating experiences rather than just planning them: From wine tastings and pop-up concepts to signature events — you curate memorable moments that stay with our guests long after their stay.

## This is you
Completed training in hospitality or gastronomy – ideally complemented by further education in management.
 Several years of leadership experience in the F&B department of a luxury hotel.
 Excellent command of German and English; Italian is an advantage.
 Entrepreneurial mindset, strong affinity with numbers, and a sharp sense for quality.
 Hands-on mentality, diplomatic skills, and a confident presence in every situation.
  Are you ready to set new culinary standards and work with a passionate team at the highest level? Then we look forward to receiving your application.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.it: Direttore Food and Beverage (m/f/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadina, Grigioni). Impiego: 100%. Contratto: Indeterminato / Permanente. Inizio posizione: 01.02.2026. ## Questo è ciò che realizzerai con noi Lussuoso. Ambizioso. Visionario. In questa nuova posizione chiave, darai forma attivamente alla direzione culinaria della nostra struttura come forza strategica trainante dietro i nostri concetti di Food & Beverage. In questo ruolo, progetterai il futuro del nostro mondo F&B — visionario, audace e con l'ambizione di portare l'eccellenza al livello successivo. Cosa rende unica questa posizione: Leadership alla pari: Guiderai un team di sette capi dipartimento esperti e circa 70 dipendenti — con chiarezza, ispirazione e un autentico talento per lo sviluppo delle persone. Architetto di concetti e innovatore: Valuterai i concetti esistenti, svilupperai nuove idee, identificherai le tendenze F&B e le sfrutterai deliberatamente. Pensi a un livello successivo e crei esperienze che entusiasmano i nostri ospiti. Strategia incontra redditività: Budgeting, previsioni, ottimizzazione dei margini — le tue decisioni sono basate sui dati, mantenendo sempre l'esperienza degli ospiti al centro. Eccellenza operativa: Stabilisci standard di qualità, semplifichi i processi, implementi nuovi strumenti e modernizzi i sistemi. Per te, l'efficienza è il risultato di una leadership forte. Connettore e moltiplicatore: Agisci come partner strategico per la Direzione Generale, la Cucina, il Marketing, le Vendite e gli Eventi — con lungimiranza, professionalità e straordinarie capacità comunicative. Creare esperienze piuttosto che pianificarle semplicemente: dalle degustazioni di vini e concetti pop-up agli eventi esclusivi — curi momenti memorabili che rimangono con i nostri ospiti molto tempo dopo il loro soggiorno. ## Questo sei tu - Formazione completata nel settore alberghiero o della ristorazione – idealmente completata da un'ulteriore formazione in gestione. - Diversi anni di esperienza nella leadership nel reparto F&B di un hotel di lusso. - Ottima padronanza del tedesco e dell'inglese; l'italiano è un vantaggio. - Mentalità imprenditoriale, forte affinità con i numeri e un acuto senso della qualità. - Mentalità pratica, capacità diplomatiche e una presenza sicura in ogni situazione. Sei pronto a stabilire nuovi standard culinari e a lavorare con un team appassionato al massimo livello? Allora non vediamo l'ora di ricevere la tua candidatura. ## Benefici Al Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo opportunità di sviluppo attraenti, alloggi confortevoli, pasti a prezzi accessibili nel ristorante per il personale e numerosi vantaggi.
descriptionByLocale.de: Food and Beverage Director (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100 %. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Unbefristet. Stellenantritt: 01.02.2026. ## Das bewegen Sie mit uns Luxuriös. Ehrgeizig. Visionär. In dieser neu geschaffenen Schlüsselposition gestalten Sie als strategischer Treiber unserer Food & Beverage-Konzepte aktiv die kulinarische Ausrichtung unseres Hauses mit. In dieser Rolle gestalten Sie die Zukunft unserer F&B-Welt – visionär, mutig und mit dem Ehrgeiz, Exzellenz auf die nächste Stufe zu heben. Das macht diese Rolle einzigartig: Führung auf Augenhöhe: Sie leiten ein Team aus sieben erfahrenen Abteilungsleitern und rund 70 Mitarbeitern – mit Klarheit, Inspiration und einem echten Talent für die Weiterentwicklung von Menschen. Konzeptarchitekt & Innovator: Du evaluierst bestehende Konzepte, entwickelst neue Ideen, erkennst F&B-Trends und setzt diese gezielt um. Du denkst auf dem nächsten Level und kreierst Erlebnisse, die unsere Gäste begeistern. Strategie trifft auf Rentabilität: Budgetierung, Prognosen, Margenoptimierung – Ihre Entscheidungen sind datengesteuert und behalten dabei stets das Gasterlebnis im Vordergrund. Operative Exzellenz: Sie etablieren Qualitätsstandards, vereinfachen Prozesse, implementieren neue Tools und modernisieren Systeme. Für Sie ist Effizienz das Ergebnis einer starken Führung. Connector & Multiplikator: Sie agieren als strategischer Partner für General Management, Kulinarik, Marketing, Vertrieb und Events – mit Weitblick, Professionalität und herausragenden Kommunikationsfähigkeiten. Erlebnisse schaffen, statt sie nur zu planen: Von Weinproben über Pop-up-Konzepte bis hin zu Signature-Events – Sie kuratieren unvergessliche Momente, die unseren Gästen noch lange nach ihrem Aufenthalt in Erinnerung bleiben. ## Das bist Du Abgeschlossene Ausbildung im Hotel- oder Gastronomiebereich – idealerweise ergänzt durch eine Weiterbildung im Management. Mehrjährige Führungserfahrung in der F&B-Abteilung eines Luxushotels. Ausgezeichnete Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse; Italienisch ist von Vorteil. Unternehmerisches Denken, ausgeprägte Affinität zu Zahlen und ein ausgeprägtes Gespür für Qualität. Hands-on-Mentalität, diplomatisches Geschick und ein souveräner Auftritt in jeder Situation. Sind Sie bereit, neue kulinarische Maßstäbe zu setzen und mit einem leidenschaftlichen Team auf höchstem Niveau zusammenzuarbeiten? Dann freuen wir uns auf Ihre Bewerbung. ## Vorteile Bei der Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeiter das Herzstück unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, günstige Verpflegung im Mitarbeiterrestaurant und zahlreiche Vergünstigungen. Jetzt bewerben ## Koch - Personal Restaurant (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Menschen auf 1800m Seehöhe prägen das Luxus-Bergreisen. Unsere dynamische und internationale Community bietet unseren Gästen smarten Luxus für ein unnachahmliches Urlaubserlebnis. Als Mitglied der Luxury Kulm Group sind Sie Teil des Schlüssels zu unserem Erfolg. Gemeinsam machen wir jeden Aufenthalt zutiefst inspirierend, einzigartig und unverwechselbar. Und als solche leben wir unsere Kultur: dezenten Luxus, Inspiration und ein Lebenserlebnis. Gemeinsam machen wir es möglich. Das ist Ihre Chance, Teil unserer Gestaltungskultur zu werden: Ihre MissionIhre Bühne – unser Herz hinter den Kulissen: In unserem Hotel stehen nicht nur unsere Gäste im Mittelpunkt – auch unsere Mitarbeiter verdienen kulinarische Momente, die begeistern. Als Koch in unserem neu gegründeten Mitarbeiterrestaurant sind Sie Gastgeber und kulinarischer Experte zugleich. Mit einer frischen, kreativen Küche und einem offenen Ohr für die Wünsche unseres Teams tragen Sie dazu bei, dass sich unsere Kollegen rundum wohlfühlen. Ihre Aufgaben: Zubereitung abwechslungsreicher, ausgewogener Menüs für unser Team – mit Liebe zum Detail und Leidenschaft für Qualität. Als Gastgeber im Mitarbeiterrestaurant: Begrüßen, einbinden und eine positive Atmosphäre schaffen. Menüplanung und Umsetzung kulinarischer Themenwochen – Ihre Ideen sind willkommen. Kombination aus Buffetservice und Live-Cooking. Sicherstellen eines reibungslosen Betriebsablaufs in Ihrem Bereich – vom Mise en Place bis zur makellosen Küchenschließung. Einhaltung der Hygienevorschriften nach HACCP – Sauberkeit ist für Sie eine Selbstverständlichkeit. Enge Zusammenarbeit mit dem Küchenteam, dem Einkauf und der Personalabteilung – um ein tolles Erlebnis für unsere Crew zu gewährleisten Das sind SieAbgeschlossene Ausbildung zum staatlich geprüften Koch oder eine gleichwertige Qualifikation Erfahrung in der warmen und kalten Küche, idealerweise in der Gemeinschaftsverpflegung oder Hotellerie Leidenschaft für die Arbeit mit Menschen – Sie haben Freude daran, Gastgeber zu sein, auch für Ihre Kollegen Starkes Organisationstalent, Belastbarkeit und ein strukturierter Arbeitsstil Kreativität bei der Menüplanung – saisonal, ausgewogen und voller Geschmack Gute Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse, Italienisch ist ein Pluspunkt Wenn Sie Ihre Liebe zur Kochkunst mit einer echten Gastgebermentalität verbinden möchten – und engagieren Sie sich in einem der schönsten Hotels der Schweiz – wir freuen uns auf Ihre Bewerbung. VorteileBei der Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeiter das Herzstück unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, günstige Verpflegung im Mitarbeiterrestaurant und zahlreiche Vergünstigungen. ## Frühstückskoch/ Commis de Cuisine Frühstück (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100 % Menschen auf 1800 m Seehöhe prägen das Luxus-Bergreisen. Dabei geht es nicht nur ums Kochen; Es geht darum, den wichtigsten Moment des Tages in einem Umfeld auf höchstem Niveau zu inszenieren. Kreativität am Buffet: Du bist für die Zubereitung und Präsentation unseres großartigen Tagesbuffets verantwortlich. Von präzise geschnittenen frischen Früchten bis hin zu feinstem Kleingebäck – jedes Detail zählt.Meister der Eiergerichte: Ob fluffige Omeletts oder perfekte Eggs Benedict – Sie bereiten À-la-carte-Bestellungen meisterhaft und schnell zu.Qualität und Sorgfalt: Sie überwachen die Lagerung der Rohstoffe und garantieren absolute Frische. Ordnung und Hygiene (HACCP) sind Ihre Visitenkarte.Teamgeist: Bei Bedarf unterstützen Sie tatkräftig die Chefs de Partie und arbeiten gemeinsam daran, unsere hervorragenden Standards aufrechtzuerhalten.Start Juni, Ende ca. 06.04.2027 Das bist DuDer frühe Vogel fängt den Wurm. Während andere noch schlummern, gibst du Höchstleistungen. Wir suchen eine sonnige Persönlichkeit, die den frühen Morgen liebt und unsere Gäste mit Energie und einem Lächeln in den Tag begleitet:Ausbildung: Sie sind ausgebildeter Koch oder verfügen über mindestens 2 Jahre spezifische Berufserfahrung in diesem Bereich.Fähigkeiten: Sie beherrschen verschiedene Kochmethoden und Frühstücksgebäckkünste.Mentalität: Sie setzen die Standardrezepte des Hotels souverän um und haben ein Auge für kontinuierliche Verbesserung.Zuverlässigkeit: Pünktlichkeit sowie die Einhaltung der persönlichen Hygiene und eines sauberen Arbeitsplatzes sind selbstverständlich Für Sie selbstverständlich.Sprachen: Italienisch sowie Englisch oder Deutsch.Warum Kronenhof:Mit uns zu arbeiten bedeutet, Teil einer Legende der Schweizer Gastfreundschaft zu werden – in einem Umfeld, in dem Talent wirklich geschätzt wird.Wir bieten eine stabile Anstellung an einem der exklusivsten Standorte der Welt.Leben im Engadin: Wir unterstützen Sie bei der Logistik! Damit Sie die Natur und Aktivitäten in Pontresina stressfrei genießen können, stellen wir Ihnen Mitarbeiterunterkünfte zu fairen Festpreisen zur Verfügung.Wachstum: Kontinuierliche Weiterbildungs- und Weiterentwicklungsmöglichkeiten. Möchten Sie Ihre Leidenschaft in unsere Küche einbringen und das Frühstück im Grand Hotel Kronenhof zum Strahlen bringen? Wir freuen uns auf Ihre Bewerbung! VorteileBei der Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeiter das Herzstück unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, günstige Verpflegung im Mitarbeiterrestaurant und zahlreiche Vergünstigungen. ## Maître de Rang (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100 % Bringen Sie Ihre Karriere auf 1800 Meter über dem Meeresspiegel auf ein neues Niveau und werden Sie Teil der Kulm Group-Familie. Sind Sie bereit, das luxuriöse Bergreiseerlebnis neu zu definieren? Werden Sie Teil unseres dynamischen und internationalen Teams bei der Kulm Group, wo wir gemeinsam unseren Gästen ein einzigartiges Luxuserlebnis bieten und unvergessliche Erinnerungen schaffen. Warum Kulm Group? Streben nach Exzellenz: Exzellenz steht im Mittelpunkt unseres Handelns. Wir streben täglich danach, das Beste zu erreichen und unsere Gäste und Mitarbeiter zu begeistern. Leidenschaftliches Team: Arbeiten Sie in einem dynamischen, internationalen Team, das sich gegenseitig unterstützt und inspiriert. Erleben Sie bei uns echte Kameradschaft und Teamgeist. Karrierechancen: Entfalten Sie Ihr Potenzial und wachsen Sie mit uns. Wir setzen uns für Ihre persönliche und berufliche Weiterentwicklung ein. Einzigartige Kultur: Tauchen Sie ein in ein Arbeitsumfeld, das Kreativität, Leidenschaft und Authentizität schätzt. Hier können Sie Ihre Ideen zum Leben erwecken und echte Wirkung erzielen. Seien Sie Teil von etwas Außergewöhnlichem! Das bewegst du bei uns. Du leitest deinen Bereich souverän und sorgst für einen reibungslosen Service mit einem Lächeln und Liebe zum Detail. Du koordinierst dein Team, delegierst Aufgaben und garantierst eine einwandfreie Ausführung. Du bist ein echter Gastgeber im Herzen und berätst unsere internationalen Gäste bei der Menü- und Weinbegleitung. Du übernimmst administrative Aufgaben wie Schichtplanung und Auftragsverwaltung mit Effizienz und Struktur. Du bringst frische Ideen ein und kreierst innovative Gästeerlebnisse, die einen bleibenden Eindruck hinterlassen. Du teilst deine Expertise mit deinem Team und treibst die Aus- und Weiterbildung kontinuierlich voran. Das sind SieEine abgeschlossene Ausbildung in der gehobenen Gastronomie und Erfahrung in der Luxusgastronomie oder der Spitzengastronomie.Führungserfahrung und die Fähigkeit, Ihr Team zu Spitzenleistungen zu motivieren und zu inspirieren.Hervorragende Kommunikationsfähigkeiten und Begeisterung für die Arbeit mit einer internationalen Kundschaft.Ausgeprägtes Organisationstalent, ein hohes Qualitätsbewusstsein und der Drang, neue Standards zu setzen.Flexibilität, Belastbarkeit und Leidenschaft für außergewöhnlichen Service.Fließende Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse sind unerlässlich; Weitere Sprachen sind ein Plus. Setzen Sie neue Maßstäbe in der Gastronomie und werden Sie Teil unseres Teams. Wir freuen uns auf Ihre Bewerbung! VorteileBei der Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeiter das Herzstück unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, günstige Verpflegung im Mitarbeiterrestaurant und zahlreiche Vergünstigungen.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Directeur de l'alimentation et des boissons (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Grisons). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag : Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-02-01. ## C'est ce que vous déménagez avec nous Luxueux. Ambitieux. Visionnaire. Dans ce poste clé nouvellement créé, vous façonnerez activement l'orientation culinaire de notre propriété en tant que moteur stratégique de nos concepts Food & Beverage. Dans ce rôle, vous façonnerez l’avenir de notre monde F&B – visionnaire, audacieux et avec l’ambition de faire passer l’excellence au niveau supérieur. Ce qui rend ce rôle unique : Leadership à hauteur de vue : vous dirigez une équipe de sept chefs de service expérimentés et d'environ 70 employés, avec clarté, inspiration et un véritable talent pour le développement des personnes. Architecte de concepts et innovateur : Vous évaluez les concepts existants, développez de nouvelles idées, identifiez les tendances F&B et les exploitez délibérément. Vous pensez au niveau supérieur et créez des expériences qui passionnent nos clients. La stratégie rencontre la rentabilité : budgétisation, prévisions, optimisation des marges : vos décisions sont basées sur les données tout en gardant toujours l'expérience client au premier plan. Excellence opérationnelle : Vous établissez des normes de qualité, simplifiez les processus, mettez en œuvre de nouveaux outils et modernisez les systèmes. Pour vous, l’efficacité est le résultat d’un leadership fort. Connecteur et multiplicateur : Vous agissez en tant que partenaire stratégique de la direction générale, de la gastronomie, du marketing, des ventes et de l'événementiel, avec prévoyance, professionnalisme et compétences en communication exceptionnelles. Créer des expériences plutôt que simplement les planifier : des dégustations de vins aux concepts éphémères en passant par les événements phares, vous organisez des moments mémorables qui resteront gravés dans la mémoire de nos clients longtemps après leur séjour. ## This is you Vous avez suivi une formation en hôtellerie ou en gastronomie – idéalement complétée par une formation continue en management. Plusieurs années d'expérience en leadership dans le département F&B d'un hôtel de luxe. Excellente maîtrise de l'allemand et de l'anglais ; L'italien est un avantage. Esprit entrepreneurial, forte affinité avec les chiffres et sens aigu de la qualité. Mentalité pratique, compétences diplomatiques et présence confiante dans toutes les situations. Êtes-vous prêt à établir de nouvelles normes culinaires et à travailler avec une équipe passionnée au plus haut niveau ? Alors nous attendons avec impatience de recevoir votre candidature. ## Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos collaborateurs sont au cœur de notre réussite. Nous proposons des opportunités de développement attrayantes, un hébergement confortable, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages. Postulez maintenant ## Cuisinier - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Les gens à 1800 m d'altitude façonnent le voyage de luxe en montagne. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale propose à nos clients un Luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous embrassons notre culture : un luxe discret, de l’inspiration et une expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance de faire partie de notre culture de création : Votre missionVotre scène – notre cœur dans les coulisses : Dans notre hôtel, ce ne sont pas seulement nos clients qui occupent le devant de la scène – nos collaborateurs méritent également des moments culinaires inspirants. En tant que cuisinier dans notre nouveau restaurant du personnel, vous êtes à la fois hôte et expert culinaire. Avec une cuisine fraîche et créative et une oreille attentive aux souhaits de notre équipe, vous contribuez à ce que nos collègues se sentent vraiment chez eux. Vos responsabilités Élaborer des menus variés et équilibrés pour notre équipe – avec le souci du détail et la passion de la qualité Être un hôte au restaurant du personnel : accueillir, impliquer et créer une ambiance positive Planification des menus et mise en place de semaines thématiques culinaires – vos idées sont les bienvenues Combinaison du service buffet et du live cooking Assurer le bon fonctionnement de votre rayon – de la mise en place à la fermeture impeccable de la cuisine Respect des règles d'hygiène selon HACCP – la propreté est une seconde nature pour vous Collaboration étroite avec l'équipe de cuisine, les achats et les RH – pour assurer un grande expérience pour notre équipe C'est vous Une formation terminée en tant que chef certifié ou qualification équivalente Une expérience en cuisine chaude et froide, idéalement dans la restauration collective ou dans l'hôtellerie Une passion pour le travail avec les gens - vous aimez être hôte, même pour vos collègues Fortes capacités d'organisation, de résilience et un style de travail structuré Créativité dans la planification des menus - saisonniers, équilibrés et pleins de saveurs Bonnes compétences en allemand et en anglais, l'italien est un plus Si vous souhaitez combiner votre amour pour les arts culinaires avec une véritable mentalité d'hôte - et contribuer à l'un des plus beaux hôtels en Suisse – nous attendons avec impatience de recevoir votre candidature. AvantagesChez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous proposons des opportunités de développement attrayantes, un hébergement confortable, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages. ## Breakfast Cook/ Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Les gens à 1800 m d'altitude façonnent le voyage de luxe en montagne. Notre communauté dynamique et internationale propose à nos clients un Luxe intelligent pour une expérience de vacances inimitable. En tant que membre du groupe Luxury Kulm, vous faites partie de la clé de notre succès. Ensemble, nous rendons chaque séjour profondément inspirant, unique et distinctif. Et en tant que tel, nous embrassons notre culture : un luxe discret, de l’inspiration et une expérience de vie. Ensemble, nous y parvenons. C'est votre chance de faire partie de notre culture de façonnage : c'est ce que vous faites avec nous. Il ne s'agit pas seulement de cuisiner ; il s'agit d'orchestrer le moment le plus important de la journée dans un environnement du plus haut niveau.Créativité au Buffet : Vous êtes responsable de la préparation et de la présentation de notre magnifique buffet quotidien. Des fruits frais tranchés avec précision aux petites pâtisseries les plus fines, chaque détail compte.Maître des plats à base d'œufs : Qu'il s'agisse d'omelettes moelleuses ou d'œufs Bénédicte parfaits, vous préparez les commandes à la carte avec maîtrise et rapidité.Qualité et soin : Vous veillez au stockage des matières premières et garantissez une fraîcheur absolue. L'ordre et l'hygiène (HACCP) sont votre carte de visite.Esprit d'équipe : Au besoin, vous soutenez activement les Chefs de Partie et travaillez ensemble pour maintenir nos excellents standards.début juin, fin ca. 06.04.2027 C'est toiLe lève-tôt attrape le ver. Pendant que les autres dorment encore, vous faites de votre mieux. Nous recherchons une personnalité ensoleillée qui aime tôt le matin et accompagne nos clients dans la journée avec énergie et sourire :Formation : Vous êtes un chef certifié ou avez au moins 2 ans d'expérience professionnelle spécifique dans ce domaine.Compétences : Vous maîtrisez diverses méthodes de cuisson et les arts de la pâtisserie du petit-déjeuner.Esprit : Vous mettez en œuvre les recettes standards de l'hôtel en toute confiance et avez le sens de l'amélioration continue.Fiabilité : La ponctualité, ainsi que le maintien d'une hygiène personnelle et d'un espace de travail propre, sont une seconde nature pour vous.Langues : italien ainsi que l'anglais ou l'allemand.Pourquoi Kronenhof :Travailler chez nous, c'est faire partie d'une légende de l'hospitalité suisse – dans un environnement où le talent est véritablement valorisé.Nous offrons un emploi stable dans l'un des endroits les plus exclusifs au monde.La vie en Engadine : nous vous soutenons pour la logistique ! Nous proposons des logements pour le personnel à des prix équitables et fixes, afin que vous puissiez profiter sans stress de la nature et des activités de Pontresina. Croissance : opportunités de formation et de développement continus. Souhaitez-vous apporter votre passion dans notre cuisine et faire briller le petit-déjeuner au Grand Hôtel Kronenhof ? Nous attendons avec impatience de recevoir votre candidature ! AvantagesChez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous proposons des opportunités de développement attrayantes, un hébergement confortable, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages. ## Maître de Rang (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Élevez votre carrière vers de nouveaux sommets à 1800 mètres d'altitude et devenez membre de la famille Kulm Group. Êtes-vous prêt à redéfinir l’expérience du voyage de luxe en montagne ? Rejoignez notre équipe dynamique et internationale du groupe Kulm, où ensemble nous offrons à nos clients une expérience de luxe unique et créons des souvenirs inoubliables. Pourquoi le Groupe Kulm ? Poursuite de l'excellence : L'excellence est au cœur de tout ce que nous faisons. Nous nous efforçons quotidiennement d'obtenir le meilleur et de ravir nos clients et nos employés. Équipe passionnée : Travaillez au sein d'une équipe internationale dynamique qui se soutient et s'inspire mutuellement. Faites l'expérience d'une véritable camaraderie et d'un esprit d'équipe avec nous. Opportunités de carrière : Libérez votre potentiel et évoluez avec nous. Nous nous engageons à votre développement personnel et professionnel.Culture unique : Plongez dans un environnement de travail qui valorise la créativité, la passion et l'authenticité. Ici, vous pouvez donner vie à vos idées et avoir un réel impact. Faites partie de quelque chose d'extraordinaire ! C'est ce que vous évoluez chez nous. Vous gérez votre section en toute confiance, assurant un service fluide avec le sourire et le souci du détail. Vous coordonnez votre équipe, déléguez des tâches et garantissez une exécution sans faille. Vous êtes un véritable hôte dans l'âme, conseillant nos clients internationaux sur les accords menu et vins. Vous assumez des tâches administratives telles que la planification des quarts de travail et la gestion des commandes avec efficacité et structure. C'est vousUne formation complète en gastronomie et une expérience dans l'hôtellerie de luxe ou la gastronomie haut de gamme.Expérience en leadership et capacité à motiver et inspirer votre équipe vers l'excellence.Compétences de communication exceptionnelles et enthousiasme pour travailler avec une clientèle internationale.De solides compétences organisationnelles, un sens élevé de la qualité et une volonté d'établir de nouvelles normes.Flexibilité, résilience et passion pour fournir un service exceptionnel.La maîtrise de l'allemand et de l'anglais est essentielle ; des langues supplémentaires sont un plus. Établissez de nouvelles normes en matière de gastronomie et devenez membre de notre équipe. Nous attendons votre candidature avec impatience ! AvantagesChez Kulm Group, nos employés sont au cœur de notre succès. Nous proposons des opportunités de développement attrayantes, un hébergement confortable, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages.

jobs.title: Front Office Agent (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Front Office Agent (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Saisonstelle / Seasonal. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-01.

## This is what you move with us
As a Front Office Agent, you are often the first and last point of contact for our international guests. In this role, you combine genuine warmth with the precision of 5-star hospitality, turning every stay into an unforgettable experience.Your Responsibilities:The First Impression: Heartfelt check-in & check-out, professional rooming, and competent guest support throughout their entire stay.
Service Excellence: Active contribution to a smooth daily front office operation according to the high standards of "The Leading Hotels of the World" (LHW).
Coordination: Handling and processing reservations via Protel, as well as reliable cash management.
Communication: Confident handling of guest inquiries and complaint management with tact and diplomacy.

## This is you
Foundation: Completed vocational training in the hotel industry and (initial) professional experience at the front office of a luxury or upscale hotel.
Languages: Fluent in German and English. Additional languages are a welcome asset.
IT Skills: Proficient in using Opera Cloud and MS Office.
Personality: You stand out through your well-groomed appearance, a resilient nature, and a genuine passion for the art of service.
Why the Kulm? We offer you a workplace in one of the most exclusive locations in the world. Look forward to a motivated team, attractive benefits within the Kulm Group, and the opportunity to gain valuable experience in a tradition-rich environment.Ready for the Kulm Spirit? We look forward to receiving your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Assistant Reservations Manager  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usYou are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration.
This is youProfessional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience.   Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales.   Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus.   Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm.   Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usFront Office & Guest: Handling late check-ins and early check-outs, providing professional guest assistance via telephone, and fulfilling special guest requests.Valet & Luggage Service: Parking guest vehicles in the garage as well as assisting with luggage service and rooming.Night Audit: Completing the daily closing in the system (Opera Cloud), auditing outlet reports, and managing physical cash handling for the accounting department.Security & Control: Conducting regular security rounds, monitoring the fire alarm panel, and ensuring night-time peace and quiet throughout the premises.Preparation: Generating department reports, purchasing and posting newspapers, and providing shoe shine services for our guests.
This is youExperience: A solid background in the hotel industry (preferably in the 5-star segment) and ideally previous experience in night shifts.IT Proficiency: Confident handling of PMS systems (Opera Cloud) as well as standard MS Office applications.Languages: Fluent in German and English; knowledge of Italian is a significant advantage due to our location and clientele.Commitment: A valid driver’s license and the physical fitness required for security rounds and luggage handling.Personality: A high sense of responsibility, absolute discretion, and a polished appearance that meets our luxury standards.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## Driver  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
This is what you move with usWarm welcome for our guests: With your natural friendliness and charisma, you make every guest feel at home from the very first moment.Valet parking: You park our guests' vehicles in the underground garage and manage garage logistics, always with attention to detail and order.Guest transfers: Whether it’s from the ski lift or to the restaurant, you handle guest transfers with the hotel shuttle, ensuring a safe and pleasant ride.Guest services: loading/ unloading the guests luggage and handling small errands as needed.
This is youNatural Friendliness and Charisma: You can almost anticipate the needs of our discerning guests and make every effort to ensure their stay is as pleasant as possible.Groomed Appearance and Excellent Manners: You represent our hotel with style, impressing with professional politeness and an elegant demeanor.Team Spirit and Flexibility: You enjoy working in a dynamic team, quickly adapting to various demands, always with a smile.Valid Driver's License: Of course, you have a valid driver's license and feel comfortable maneuvering in tight parking spaces and on the road.Language Skills: Ideally, you speak German and English, with additional languages (particularly Italian) being a welcome advantage.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

jobs.title: Linen Employee (part-time 50%) (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Linen Employee (part-time 50%) (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 50%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-10.

## This is what you move with us
At the Grand Hotel Kronenhof, we value the highest quality – and this extends to our linen. Since our textiles are cleaned at the professional laundry facility of our partner hotel, the Kulm, we are looking for an organized individual to ensure a smooth workflow and on-site quality assurance in Pontresina.What you achieve with us:Logistics Management: You coordinate the daily flow of linen (soiled/clean) between the Kronenhof and the Kulm laundry.
Quality Control: You inspect incoming laundry for cleanliness and completeness, ensuring our high standards are consistently met.
Inventory Management: You organize the storage of floor linen, uniforms, and guest laundry, ensuring all departments are supplied on time.
Communication: You serve as the direct point of contact for the laundry team at the Kulm Hotel and handle operational details with confidence.
Minor Repairs: When necessary, you take care of simple sewing tasks or repairs to uniforms and textiles.

## This is you
Organizational Talent: You maintain an overview even with large volumes of laundry and work in a structured and efficient manner.
Quality Consciousness: You have an eye for textiles and immediately recognize when something does not meet our 5-star requirements.
Reliability: Punctuality and the physical stamina required for handling laundry trolleys are a matter of course for you.
Team Player: You communicate in a friendly and clear manner – both internally with Housekeeping and externally with colleagues at the Kulm.
Language Skills: Good knowledge of English and either German or Italian is essential for coordination and documentation.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

descriptionByLocale.en:
Linen Employee (part-time 50%) (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 50%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-06-10.

## This is what you move with us
At the Grand Hotel Kronenhof, we value the highest quality – and this extends to our linen. Since our textiles are cleaned at the professional laundry facility of our partner hotel, the Kulm, we are looking for an organized individual to ensure a smooth workflow and on-site quality assurance in Pontresina.What you achieve with us:Logistics Management: You coordinate the daily flow of linen (soiled/clean) between the Kronenhof and the Kulm laundry.
Quality Control: You inspect incoming laundry for cleanliness and completeness, ensuring our high standards are consistently met.
Inventory Management: You organize the storage of floor linen, uniforms, and guest laundry, ensuring all departments are supplied on time.
Communication: You serve as the direct point of contact for the laundry team at the Kulm Hotel and handle operational details with confidence.
Minor Repairs: When necessary, you take care of simple sewing tasks or repairs to uniforms and textiles.

## This is you
Organizational Talent: You maintain an overview even with large volumes of laundry and work in a structured and efficient manner.
Quality Consciousness: You have an eye for textiles and immediately recognize when something does not meet our 5-star requirements.
Reliability: Punctuality and the physical stamina required for handling laundry trolleys are a matter of course for you.
Team Player: You communicate in a friendly and clear manner – both internally with Housekeeping and externally with colleagues at the Kulm.
Language Skills: Good knowledge of English and either German or Italian is essential for coordination and documentation.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## This is what you move with us
You confidently manage your section, ensuring seamless service with a smile and attention to detail.
You coordinate your team, delegate tasks, and guarantee flawless execution.
You are a true host at heart, advising our international guests on menu and wine pairings.
You take on administrative tasks such as shift planning and order management with efficiency and structure.
You introduce fresh ideas and create innovative guest experiences that leave a lasting impression.
You share your expertise with your team, continuously fostering training and development.

## This is you
A completed education in fine dining and experience in luxury hospitality or high-end gastronomy.
Leadership experience and the ability to motivate and inspire your team to excellence.
Outstanding communication skills and enthusiasm for working with an international clientele.
Strong organizational skills, a high sense of quality, and a drive to set new standards.
Flexibility, resilience, and a passion for delivering exceptional service.
Fluency in German and English is essential; additional languages are a plus.
Set new standards in fine dining and become part of our team. We look forward to your application!

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture:
Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities  Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere  Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew
This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

## This is what you move with us
You confidently manage your section, ensuring seamless service with a smile and attention to detail.
You coordinate your team, delegate tasks, and guarantee flawless execution.
You are a true host at heart, advising our international guests on menu and wine pairings.
You take on administrative tasks such as shift planning and order management with efficiency and structure.
You introduce fresh ideas and create innovative guest experiences that leave a lasting impression.
You share your expertise with your team, continuously fostering training and development.

## This is you
A completed education in fine dining and experience in luxury hospitality or high-end gastronomy.
Leadership experience and the ability to motivate and inspire your team to excellence.
Outstanding communication skills and enthusiasm for working with an international clientele.
Strong organizational skills, a high sense of quality, and a drive to set new standards.
Flexibility, resilience, and a passion for delivering exceptional service.
Fluency in German and English is essential; additional languages are a plus.
Set new standards in fine dining and become part of our team. We look forward to your application!

## Benefits

jobs.title: Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d)
jobs.description:
Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-10-01.

## This is what you move with us
Front Office & Guest: Handling late check-ins and early check-outs, providing professional guest assistance via telephone, and fulfilling special guest requests.
Valet & Luggage Service: Parking guest vehicles in the garage as well as assisting with luggage service and rooming.
Night Audit: Completing the daily closing in the system (Opera Cloud), auditing outlet reports, and managing physical cash handling for the accounting department.
Security & Control: Conducting regular security rounds, monitoring the fire alarm panel, and ensuring night-time peace and quiet throughout the premises.
Preparation: Generating department reports, purchasing and posting newspapers, and providing shoe shine services for our guests.

## This is you
Experience: A solid background in the hotel industry (preferably in the 5-star segment) and ideally previous experience in night shifts.
IT Proficiency: Confident handling of PMS systems (Opera Cloud) as well as standard MS Office applications.
Languages: Fluent in German and English; knowledge of Italian is a significant advantage due to our location and clientele.
Commitment: A valid driver’s license and the physical fitness required for security rounds and luggage handling.
Personality: A high sense of responsibility, absolute discretion, and a polished appearance that meets our luxury standards.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now

## Assistant Reservations Manager  (m/w/d)
Grand Hotel Kronenhof
            

                            
                    
                    100%
                

                    

        
            People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. This is what you move with usYou are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration.
This is youProfessional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience.   Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales.   Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus.   Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm.   Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

Kulm Hotel

This is what you move with usHandling Guest Inquiries: You respond to written and telephone inquiries in a professional and service-oriented manner, working in close coordination with the Concierge Team. Administrative Support: You assist the Concierge Team in daily operations by reliably managing administrative tasks and scheduling. Data Management & Documentation: You maintain guest information and internal overviews, ensuring accurate and well-organized documentation of relevant data. Process Optimization: You identify opportunities to streamline workflows and implement minor automation solutions using tools such as Power Automate or Zapier. Backoffice Coordination: You keep track of tasks, deadlines, and internal communication, ensuring a smooth flow of information within the team. Quality Assurance: You help monitor the tools and systems in use and contribute ideas for improving the overall guest service offering.
This is youA structured, self-reliant work style with a strong sense of quality, discretion, and reliability. Excellent verbal and written communication skills in German and English – any additional language, especially Italian, is a plus. A passion for organization, strong digital skills, and confident use of MS Office applications. A service-driven mindset: you see yourself as a supportive team member working behind the scenes – and you know that outstanding guest experiences are built on an excellent back office.
BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

descriptionByLocale.de:
Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d) — Grand Hotel Kronenhof, Pontresina (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: 10-Monats-Stelle / 10-month contract. Stellenantritt: 2026-10-01.

## This is what you move with us
Front Office & Guest: Handling late check-ins and early check-outs, providing professional guest assistance via telephone, and fulfilling special guest requests.
Valet & Luggage Service: Parking guest vehicles in the garage as well as assisting with luggage service and rooming.
Night Audit: Completing the daily closing in the system (Opera Cloud), auditing outlet reports, and managing physical cash handling for the accounting department.
Security & Control: Conducting regular security rounds, monitoring the fire alarm panel, and ensuring night-time peace and quiet throughout the premises.
Preparation: Generating department reports, purchasing and posting newspapers, and providing shoe shine services for our guests.

## This is you
Experience: A solid background in the hotel industry (preferably in the 5-star segment) and ideally previous experience in night shifts.
IT Proficiency: Confident handling of PMS systems (Opera Cloud) as well as standard MS Office applications.
Languages: Fluent in German and English; knowledge of Italian is a significant advantage due to our location and clientele.
Commitment: A valid driver’s license and the physical fitness required for security rounds and luggage handling.
Personality: A high sense of responsibility, absolute discretion, and a polished appearance that meets our luxury standards.

## Benefits
At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

        
            Apply now
